titleByLocale.en: Data Center Technician - Switzerland - Rümlang - On-site

jobs.description:
About the Role
 Join our team as a Data Center Technician in Rümlang, Switzerland . This is a full-time, on-site position where you'll support critical infrastructure at world-class data center facilities.
 Compensation & Benefits
 CHF80,000-100,000/year (CHF annual)
 Comprehensive benefits package including:
 
• Health, dental, and vision insurance

• Paid time off and holidays

• Professional development allowance

• Certification sponsorship

 Work Schedule
 
• Full-time permanent position

• Standard business hours with on-call rotation

• Shift differentials for nights/weekends when applicable

 Key Responsibilities
 
• Install, configure, and maintain server and network equipment

• Perform structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

• Execute hardware deployments and decommissions

• Monitor environmental systems (power, cooling, security)

• Respond to incidents and perform troubleshooting

• Maintain accurate documentation and asset tracking

• Collaborate with engineering and operations teams

• Participate in capacity planning and upgrades

Requirements:
• 3+ years data center operations experience

• Expert cabling skills (Cat6/6a, OM3/OM4/OS2 fiber)

• Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving abilities

• Experience with rack and stack operations

• Understanding of power distribution and UPS systems

• Excellent documentation and communication skills

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in demanding environments

• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, CDCE) - preferred

• Vendor certifications (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, JNCIA) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM platforms - preferred

• Knowledge of ITIL practices - preferred

descriptionByLocale.it: Descrizione Unisciti al nostro team come Tecnico Data Center a Rümlang, Svizzera. Questa è una posizione a tempo pieno, con presenza in sede, dove supporterai l'infrastruttura critica in impianti di data center di livello mondiale. ## Compenso e Benefici - CHF80.000-100.000/anno (CHF annuali) - Pacchetto di benefici completo, inclusi: - Assicurazione sanitaria, dentale e visiva - Ferie e giorni festivi retribuiti - Conto per lo sviluppo professionale - Sponsorizzazione certificazioni ## Orario di Lavoro - Posizione a tempo pieno e permanente - Orario standard con rotazione di chiamata - Differenziali di turno per notti/fine settimana quando applicabili ## Responsabilità Principali - Installare, configurare e mantenere l'equipaggiamento server e di rete - Eseguire cablaggi strutturati (rame e fibra ottica) - Eseguire deployments e decommissioni di hardware - Monitorare i sistemi ambientali (alimentazione, raffreddamento, sicurezza) - Rispondere a incidenti e eseguire troubleshooting - Mantenere documentazione accurata e tracciamento degli asset - Collaborare con i team di ingegneria e operazioni - Partecipare alla pianificazione della capacità e agli aggiornamenti ## Requisiti - 3+ anni di esperienza in operazioni data center - Competenze avanzate in cablaggio (Cat6/6a, OM3/OM4/OS2 fiber) - Capacità di troubleshooting e problem-solving forti - Esperienza con operazioni rack e stack - Conoscenza di distribuzione di energia e sistemi UPS - Eccellenti competenze di documentazione e comunicazione - Capacità di sollevare 50+ libbre e lavorare in ambienti esigenti - Certificazioni data center (CDCP, CDCS, CDCE) - preferite - Certificazioni vendor (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - preferite - Certificazioni di rete (CCNA, JNCIA) - preferite - Esperienza con piattaforme DCIM - preferite - Conoscenza di pratiche ITIL - preferite
descriptionByLocale.en: About the Role Join our team as a Data Center Technician in Rümlang, Switzerland . This is a full-time, on-site position where you'll support critical infrastructure at world-class data center facilities. Compensation & Benefits CHF80,000-100,000/year (CHF annual) Comprehensive benefits package including: • Health, dental, and vision insurance • Paid time off and holidays • Professional development allowance • Certification sponsorship Work Schedule • Full-time permanent position • Standard business hours with on-call rotation • Shift differentials for nights/weekends when applicable Key Responsibilities • Install, configure, and maintain server and network equipment • Perform structured cabling (copper and fiber optic) • Execute hardware deployments and decommissions • Monitor environmental systems (power, cooling, security) • Respond to incidents and perform troubleshooting • Maintain accurate documentation and asset tracking • Collaborate with engineering and operations teams • Participate in capacity planning and upgrades Requirements: • 3+ years data center operations experience • Expert cabling skills (Cat6/6a, OM3/OM4/OS2 fiber) • Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving abilities • Experience with rack and stack operations • Understanding of power distribution and UPS systems • Excellent documentation and communication skills • Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in demanding environments • Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, CDCE) - preferred • Vendor certifications (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - preferred • Network certifications (CCNA, JNCIA) - preferred • Experience with DCIM platforms - preferred • Knowledge of ITIL practices - preferred
descriptionByLocale.de: Beschreibung Treten Sie unserem Team als Data Center Techniker in Rümlang, Schweiz, bei. Dies ist eine Vollzeitstelle mit Präsenzpflicht, in der Sie die kritische Infrastruktur in weltklassigen Data Center-Einrichtungen unterstützen. ## Vergütung und Benefits - CHF 80.000-100.000/Jahr (CHF jährlich) - Umfassendes Benefits-Paket, einschließlich: - Kranken-, Zahn- und Augenversicherung - Bezahlter Urlaub und Feiertage - Entwicklungszuschuss für die Weiterbildung - Sponsoring von Zertifizierungen ## Arbeitszeit - Vollzeitstelle mit fester Anstellung - Standardarbeitszeiten mit Bereitschaftsdienst - Schichtzuschläge für Nächte/Wochenenden, wenn zutreffend ## Hauptaufgaben - Installation, Konfiguration und Wartung von Server- und Netzwerkequipment - Durchführung von strukturierten Verkabelungen (Kupfer und Glasfaser) - Durchführung von Hardware-Deployments und Decommissionings - Überwachung von Umweltanlagen (Stromversorgung, Kühlung, Sicherheit) - Reaktion auf Vorfälle und Fehlerbehebung - Erhalt präziser Dokumentation und Asset-Tracking - Zusammenarbeit mit Ingenieur- und Operations-Teams - Teilnahme an Kapazitätsplanung und Upgrades ## Anforderungen - 3+ Jahre Erfahrung in Data Center-Betrieb - Expertenwissen in Verkabelung (Cat6/6a, OM3/OM4/OS2 Faser) - Starke Fähigkeiten im Fehlerbehebung und Problemlösen - Erfahrung mit Rack- und Stack-Betrieb - Verständnis von Stromverteilung und UPS-Systemen - Exzellente Dokumentations- und Kommunikationsfähigkeiten - Fähigkeit, 50+ Pfund zu heben und in anspruchsvollen Umgebungen zu arbeiten - Data Center-Zertifizierungen (CDCP, CDCS, CDCE) - bevorzugt - Vendor-Zertifizierungen (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - bevorzugt - Netzwerk-Zertifizierungen (CCNA, JNCIA) - bevorzugt - Erfahrung mit DCIM-Plattformen - bevorzugt - Kenntnisse von ITIL-Praktiken - bevorzugt
descriptionByLocale.fr: Description Rejoignez notre équipe en tant que Technicien Data Center à Rümlang, en Suisse. Il s'agit d'un poste à temps plein en présentiel où vous supporterez l'infrastructure critique dans des installations de data center de classe mondiale. ## Rémunération et avantages - CHF 80 000-100 000/an (CHF annuel) - Forfait complet d'avantages, y compris : - Assurance santé, dentaire et visuelle - Congés payés et jours fériés - Allocation de développement professionnel - Sponsoring de certifications ## Horaires de travail - Poste à temps plein permanent - Horaires standards avec rotation de garde - Différentiels de garde pour les nuits et week-ends lorsque applicable ## Responsabilités principales - Installer, configurer et maintenir l'équipement serveur et réseau - Effectuer des câblages structurés (cuivre et fibre optique) - Exécuter des déploiements et des décommissions de matériel - Surveiller les systèmes environnementaux (alimentation, refroidissement, sécurité) - Répondre aux incidents et effectuer des dépannages - Maintenir une documentation précise et un suivi des actifs - Collaborer avec les équipes d'ingénierie et d'exploitation - Participer à la planification de la capacité et aux mises à jour ## Exigences - 3+ années d'expérience en opérations de data center - Compétences avancées en câblage (Cat6/6a, OM3/OM4/OS2 fibre) - Capacités fortes en dépannage et résolution de problèmes - Expérience avec les opérations rack et stack - Compréhension des systèmes de distribution d'énergie et UPS - Excellentes compétences en documentation et communication - Capacité à soulever 50+ livres et à travailler dans des environnements exigeants - Certifications data center (CDCP, CDCS, CDCE) - préférées - Certifications fournisseur (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - préférées - Certifications réseau (CCNA, JNCIA) - préférées - Expérience avec les plateformes DCIM - préférées - Connaissance des pratiques ITIL - préférées

jobs.description:
About the Role
 Join our team as a Data Center Technician in Zurich, Switzerland . This is a full-time, on-site position where you'll support critical infrastructure at world-class data center facilities.
 Compensation & Benefits
 CHF92,000-115,000/year (CHF annual)
 Comprehensive benefits package including:
 
• Health, dental, and vision insurance

• Paid time off and holidays

• Professional development allowance

• Certification sponsorship

 Work Schedule
 
• Full-time permanent position

• Standard business hours with on-call rotation

• Shift differentials for nights/weekends when applicable

 Key Responsibilities
 
• Install, configure, and maintain server and network equipment

• Perform structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

• Execute hardware deployments and decommissions

• Monitor environmental systems (power, cooling, security)

• Respond to incidents and perform troubleshooting

• Maintain accurate documentation and asset tracking

• Collaborate with engineering and operations teams

• Participate in capacity planning and upgrades

Requirements:
• 3+ years data center operations experience

• Expert cabling skills (Cat6/6a, OM3/OM4/OS2 fiber)

• Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving abilities

• Experience with rack and stack operations

• Understanding of power distribution and UPS systems

• Excellent documentation and communication skills

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in demanding environments

• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, CDCE) - preferred

• Vendor certifications (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, JNCIA) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM platforms - preferred

• Knowledge of ITIL practices - preferred

Compensation & Benefits CHF80,000-100,000/year (CHF annual) Comprehensive benefits package including: • Health, dental, and vision insurance • Paid time off and holidays • Professional development allowance • Certification sponsorship Work Schedule • Full-time permanent position • Standard business hours with on-call rotation • Shift differentials for nights/weekends when applicable Key Responsibilities • Install, configure, and maintain server and network equipment • Perform structured cabling (copper and fiber optic) • Execute hardware deployments and decommissions • Monitor environmental systems (power, cooling, security) • Respond to incidents and perform troubleshooting • Maintain accurate documentation and asset tracking • Collaborate with engineering and operations teams • Participate in capacity planning and upgrades Requirements: • 3+ years data center operations experience • Expert cabling skills (Cat6/6a, OM3/OM4/OS2 fiber) • Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving abilities • Experience with rack and stack operations • Understanding of power distribution and UPS systems • Excellent documentation and communication skills • Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in demanding environments • Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, CDCE) - preferred • Vendor certifications (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - preferred • Network certifications (CCNA, JNCIA) - preferred • Experience with DCIM platforms - preferred • Knowledge of ITIL practices - preferred
descriptionByLocale.de: Über die Stelle - Treten Sie unserem Team als Data Center Techniker in Lupfig, Schweiz, bei - Dies ist eine Vollzeitstelle mit Präsenzpflicht, bei der Sie die kritische Infrastruktur in weltklassigen Data Center-Einrichtungen unterstützen ## Vergütung und Benefits - CHF80.000-100.000/Jahr (CHF jährlich) - Umfassendes Benefits-Paket, einschließlich: - Kranken-, Zahn- und Augenversicherung - Bezahlter Urlaub und Feiertage - Entwicklungszuschuss für die Weiterbildung - Sponsoring von Zertifizierungen ## Arbeitszeit - Vollzeitstelle mit fester Anstellung - Standardarbeitszeiten mit Schichtrotation - Schichtzuschläge für Nächte/Wochenenden, wenn zutreffend ## Hauptaufgaben - Installation, Konfiguration und Wartung von Server- und Netzwerkequipment - Durchführung von strukturierten Kabeln (Kupfer und Glasfaser) - Durchführung von Hardware-Deployments und Decommissionings - Überwachung von Umweltanlagen (Strom, Kühlung, Sicherheit) - Reaktion auf Vorfälle und Fehlerbehebung - Erstellung und Pflege akkurater Dokumentation und Asset-Tracking - Zusammenarbeit mit Ingenieur- und Operations-Teams - Teilnahme an Kapazitätsplanung und Upgrades ## Anforderungen - 3+ Jahre Erfahrung in Data Center-Betrieb - Expertenwissen in Kabeln (Cat6/6a, OM3/OM4/OS2 Faser) - Starke Fähigkeiten in der Fehlerbehebung und Problemlösung - Erfahrung mit Rack- und Stack-Betrieb - Verständnis von Stromverteilung und UPS-Systemen - Exzellente Dokumentations- und Kommunikationsfähigkeiten - Fähigkeit, 50+ lbs zu heben und in anspruchsvollen Umgebungen zu arbeiten - Data Center-Zertifizierungen (CDCP, CDCS, CDCE) - bevorzugt - Vendor-Zertifizierungen (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - bevorzugt - Netzwerk-Zertifizierungen (CCNA, JNCIA) - bevorzugt - Erfahrung mit DCIM-Plattformen - bevorzugt - Kenntnisse von ITIL-Praktiken - bevorzugt
descriptionByLocale.fr: À propos du poste - Rejoignez notre équipe en tant que Technicien Data Center à Lupfig, Suisse - Il s'agit d'un poste à temps plein en présentiel où vous supporterez l'infrastructure critique dans des installations de data center de classe mondiale ## Rémunération et avantages - CHF80.000-100.000/an (CHF annuel) - Forfait complet d'avantages, y compris : - Assurance santé, dentaire et visuelle - Congés payés et jours fériés - Allocation de développement professionnel - Parrainage des certifications ## Horaires de travail - Poste à temps plein en CDI - Horaires standard avec rotation d'appels - Différentiels de shift pour les nuits/week-ends, le cas échéant ## Responsabilités principales - Installer, configurer et maintenir l'équipement serveur et réseau - Effectuer le câblage structuré (cuivre et fibre optique) - Exécuter les déploiements et décommissions d'équipements - Surveiller les systèmes environnementaux (alimentation, refroidissement, sécurité) - Répondre aux incidents et effectuer le dépannage - Maintenir une documentation précise et un suivi des actifs - Collaborer avec les équipes d'ingénierie et d'exploitation - Participer à la planification de la capacité et aux mises à jour ## Exigences - 3+ années d'expérience dans les opérations de data center - Compétences avancées en câblage (Cat6/6a, OM3/OM4/OS2 fibre) - Capacités de dépannage et de résolution de problèmes avancées - Expérience avec les opérations de rack et de stack - Connaissance des systèmes de distribution d'énergie et des UPS - Excellentes compétences en documentation et communication - Capacité à soulever 50+ lbs et à travailler dans des environnements exigeants - Certifications de data center (CDCP, CDCS, CDCE) - préférées - Certifications de fournisseurs (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - préférées - Certifications réseau (CCNA, JNCIA) - préférées - Expérience avec les plateformes DCIM - préférée - Connaissance des pratiques ITIL - préférée

jobs.description:
About the Role
 Join our team as a Data Center Technician in Meyrin, Switzerland . This is a full-time, on-site position where you'll support critical infrastructure at world-class data center facilities.
 Compensation & Benefits
 CHF80,000-100,000/year (CHF annual)
 Comprehensive benefits package including:
 
• Health, dental, and vision insurance

• Paid time off and holidays

• Professional development allowance

• Certification sponsorship

 Work Schedule
 
• Full-time permanent position

• Standard business hours with on-call rotation

• Shift differentials for nights/weekends when applicable

 Key Responsibilities
 
• Install, configure, and maintain server and network equipment

• Perform structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

• Execute hardware deployments and decommissions

• Monitor environmental systems (power, cooling, security)

• Respond to incidents and perform troubleshooting

• Maintain accurate documentation and asset tracking

• Collaborate with engineering and operations teams

• Participate in capacity planning and upgrades

Requirements:
• 3+ years data center operations experience

• Expert cabling skills (Cat6/6a, OM3/OM4/OS2 fiber)

• Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving abilities

• Experience with rack and stack operations

• Understanding of power distribution and UPS systems

• Excellent documentation and communication skills

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in demanding environments

• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, CDCE) - preferred

• Vendor certifications (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, JNCIA) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM platforms - preferred

• Knowledge of ITIL practices - preferred

descriptionByLocale.it: Informazioni sul ruolo - Unisciti al nostro team come Tecnico Data Center a Meyrin, Svizzera - Questa è una posizione a tempo pieno, in sede, dove supporterai l'infrastruttura critica in strutture di data center di livello mondiale ## Compenso e Benefici - CHF80.000-100.000/anno (CHF annuale) - Pacchetto di benefici completo che include: - Assicurazione sanitaria, dentale e visiva - Ferie e giorni festivi retribuiti - Conto per lo sviluppo professionale - Sponsorizzazione delle certificazioni ## Orario di lavoro - Posizione a tempo pieno e permanente - Orario standard con rotazione di chiamata - Differenziali di turno per notti/fine settimana quando applicabile ## Responsabilità principali - Installare, configurare e mantenere l'equipaggiamento server e di rete - Eseguire il cablaggio strutturato (rame e fibra ottica) - Eseguire i deploy e le decommissioni dell'hardware - Monitorare i sistemi ambientali (alimentazione, raffreddamento, sicurezza) - Rispondere agli incidenti e eseguire il troubleshooting - Mantenere la documentazione accurata e il tracciamento degli asset - Collaborare con i team di ingegneria e operazioni - Partecipare alla pianificazione della capacità e agli aggiornamenti ## Requisiti - 3+ anni di esperienza nelle operazioni di data center - Competenze avanzate in cablaggio (Cat6/6a, OM3/OM4/OS2 fiber) - Forte capacità di troubleshooting e risoluzione dei problemi - Esperienza con operazioni di rack e stack - Conoscenza dei sistemi di distribuzione di energia e UPS - Eccellenti capacità di documentazione e comunicazione - Capacità di sollevare 50+ libbre e lavorare in ambienti esigenti - Certificazioni di data center (CDCP, CDCS, CDCE) - preferite - Certificazioni di vendor (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - preferite - Certificazioni di rete (CCNA, JNCIA) - preferite - Esperienza con piattaforme DCIM - preferite - Conoscenza delle pratiche ITIL - preferite

About the Role
 Join our team as a Data Center Technician in Basel, Switzerland . This is a full-time, on-site position where you'll support critical infrastructure at world-class data center facilities.

• Health, dental, and vision insurance

• Paid time off and holidays

• Professional development allowance

• Certification sponsorship

 Work Schedule
 
• Full-time permanent position

• Standard business hours with on-call rotation

• Shift differentials for nights/weekends when applicable

• Install, configure, and maintain server and network equipment

• Perform structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

• Execute hardware deployments and decommissions

• Monitor environmental systems (power, cooling, security)

• Maintain accurate documentation and asset tracking

• Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving abilities

• Experience with rack and stack operations

• Understanding of power distribution and UPS systems

• Excellent documentation and communication skills

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in demanding environments

• Vendor certifications (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, JNCIA) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM platforms - preferred

• Knowledge of ITIL practices - preferred

About the Role
 Join our team as a Data Center Technician in Avenches, Switzerland . This is a full-time, on-site position where you'll support critical infrastructure at world-class data center facilities.
 Compensation & Benefits
 CHF80,000-100,000/year (CHF annual)
 Comprehensive benefits package including:
 
• Health, dental, and vision insurance

• Paid time off and holidays

• Professional development allowance

• Certification sponsorship

 Work Schedule
 
• Full-time permanent position

• Standard business hours with on-call rotation

• Shift differentials for nights/weekends when applicable

• Install, configure, and maintain server and network equipment

• Perform structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

• Execute hardware deployments and decommissions

• Monitor environmental systems (power, cooling, security)

• Respond to incidents and perform troubleshooting

• Maintain accurate documentation and asset tracking

• Collaborate with engineering and operations teams

• Participate in capacity planning and upgrades

Requirements:

• Expert cabling skills (Cat6/6a, OM3/OM4/OS2 fiber)

• Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving abilities

• Experience with rack and stack operations

• Understanding of power distribution and UPS systems

• Excellent documentation and communication skills

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in demanding environments

• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, CDCE) - preferred

• Vendor certifications (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, JNCIA) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM platforms - preferred

• Knowledge of ITIL practices - preferred

Cette position à temps plein, sur site, vous permettra de soutenir des infrastructures critiques dans des structures de data center de niveau mondial. ## Ce que nous offrons - CHF 80.000-100.000/an (CHF annuels) - Pack de benefits complet comprenant : - Assurance santé, dentaire et oculaire - Temps libre rémunéré et jours fériés - Indemnité de développement professionnel - Sponsorisation de certifications ## Horaires de travail - Position à temps plein avec contrat permanent - Horaires de travail standard avec disponibilité - Differenciations pour les horaires de nuit/week-end lorsqu'appliquables ## Tâches - Installer, configurer et entretenir des serveurs et des équipements de réseau - Effectuer des câblages structurés (cuivre et fibre optique) - Effectuer des implantations et des démolitions d'équipements - Surveiller les systèmes environnementaux (alimentation, refroidissement, sécurité) - Répondre aux incidents et résoudre les problèmes - Maintenir des documents précis et suivre les actifs - Collaborer avec des équipes d'ingénierie et d'exploitation - Participer à la planification de la capacité et aux mises à jour ## Exigences - 3+ ans d'expérience dans les opérations de data center - Compétences expertes en câblage (Cat6/6a, fibre OM3/OM4/OS2) - Fortes capacités de résolution de problèmes - Expérience avec les opérations de rack et stack - Compréhension de la distribution de l'alimentation et des systèmes UPS - Excellentes capacités de documentation et de communication - Capacité de soulever plus de 23 kg et travailler dans des environnements exigeants - Certifications de data center (CDCP, CDCS, CDCE) - souhaitable - Certifications de fournisseur (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - souhaitable - Certifications de réseau (CCNA, JNCIA) - souhaitable - Expérience avec les plateformes DCIM - souhaitable - Connaissances des pratiques ITIL - souhaitable

jobs.description:
About the Role
 Join our team as a Data Center Technician in Biel/Bienne, Switzerland . This is a full-time, on-site position where you'll support critical infrastructure at world-class data center facilities.
 Compensation & Benefits
 CHF80,000-100,000/year (CHF annual)
 Comprehensive benefits package including:
 
• Health, dental, and vision insurance

• Paid time off and holidays

• Professional development allowance

• Certification sponsorship

 Work Schedule
 
• Full-time permanent position

• Standard business hours with on-call rotation

• Shift differentials for nights/weekends when applicable

 Key Responsibilities
 
• Install, configure, and maintain server and network equipment

• Perform structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

• Execute hardware deployments and decommissions

• Monitor environmental systems (power, cooling, security)

• Respond to incidents and perform troubleshooting

• Maintain accurate documentation and asset tracking

• Collaborate with engineering and operations teams

• Participate in capacity planning and upgrades

Requirements:
• 3+ years data center operations experience

• Expert cabling skills (Cat6/6a, OM3/OM4/OS2 fiber)

• Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving abilities

• Experience with rack and stack operations

• Understanding of power distribution and UPS systems

• Excellent documentation and communication skills

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in demanding environments

• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, CDCE) - preferred

• Vendor certifications (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, JNCIA) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM platforms - preferred

• Knowledge of ITIL practices - preferred

Compensation & Benefits CHF80,000-100,000/year (CHF annual) Comprehensive benefits package including: • Health, dental, and vision insurance • Paid time off and holidays • Professional development allowance • Certification sponsorship Work Schedule • Full-time permanent position • Standard business hours with on-call rotation • Shift differentials for nights/weekends when applicable Key Responsibilities • Install, configure, and maintain server and network equipment • Perform structured cabling (copper and fiber optic) • Execute hardware deployments and decommissions • Monitor environmental systems (power, cooling, security) • Respond to incidents and perform troubleshooting • Maintain accurate documentation and asset tracking • Collaborate with engineering and operations teams • Participate in capacity planning and upgrades Requirements: • 3+ years data center operations experience • Expert cabling skills (Cat6/6a, OM3/OM4/OS2 fiber) • Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving abilities • Experience with rack and stack operations • Understanding of power distribution and UPS systems • Excellent documentation and communication skills • Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in demanding environments • Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, CDCE) - preferred • Vendor certifications (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - preferred • Network certifications (CCNA, JNCIA) - preferred • Experience with DCIM platforms - preferred • Knowledge of ITIL practices - preferred
descriptionByLocale.de: Über die Stelle - Treten Sie unserem Team als Data Center Techniker in Dielsdorf, Schweiz, bei - Dies ist eine Vollzeitstelle, die vor Ort zu arbeiten, bei der Sie die kritische Infrastruktur in Weltklasse-Datenzentrumsanlagen unterstützen ## Vergütung und Vorteile - CHF80.000-100.000/Jahr (CHF jährlich) - Umfassendes Benefits-Paket, das Folgendes umfasst: - Kranken-, Zahn- und Augenversicherung - Bezahlte Urlaubstage und Feiertage - Entwicklungszuschuss für die Berufsausbildung - Sponsoring von Zertifizierungen ## Arbeitszeit - Vollzeitstelle mit fester Anstellung - Standardarbeitszeiten mit Rufbereitschaft - Schichtzuschläge für Nächte/Wochenenden, wenn zutreffend ## Hauptaufgaben - Installation, Konfiguration und Wartung von Server- und Netzwerkequipment - Durchführung von strukturiertem Kabeln (Kupfer und Glasfaser) - Durchführung von Hardware-Einsätzen und Aussonderungen - Überwachung von Umweltanlagen (Stromversorgung, Kühlung, Sicherheit) - Reaktion auf Vorfälle und Fehlerbehebung - Erhalt akkurater Dokumentation und Asset-Tracking - Zusammenarbeit mit Ingenieur- und Operations-Teams - Teilnahme an Kapazitätsplanung und Upgrades ## Anforderungen - 3+ Jahre Erfahrung in Data Center-Betrieb - Expertenwissen im Kabeln (Cat6/6a, OM3/OM4/OS2 Faser) - Starke Fähigkeiten in der Fehlerbehebung und Problemlösung - Erfahrung mit Rack- und Stack-Betrieb - Verständnis von Stromverteilung und UPS-Systemen - Exzellente Dokumentations- und Kommunikationsfähigkeiten - Fähigkeit, 50+ lbs zu heben und in anspruchsvollen Umgebungen zu arbeiten - Data Center-Zertifizierungen (CDCP, CDCS, CDCE) - bevorzugt - Herstellerzertifizierungen (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - bevorzugt - Netzwerkzertifizierungen (CCNA, JNCIA) - bevorzugt - Erfahrung mit DCIM-Plattformen - bevorzugt - Kenntnisse von ITIL-Praktiken - bevorzugt
descriptionByLocale.fr: À propos du poste - Rejoignez notre équipe en tant que Technicien Data Center à Dielsdorf, Suisse - Il s'agit d'un poste à temps plein en présentiel où vous supporterez l'infrastructure critique dans des installations de data center de classe mondiale ## Rémunération et avantages - CHF80.000-100.000/an (CHF annuel) - Forfait complet de prestations qui inclut : - Assurance santé, dentaire et visuelle - Congés payés et jours fériés - Allocation de développement professionnel - Parrainage de certifications ## Horaires de travail - Poste à temps plein permanent - Horaires standard avec rotation de garde - Différentiels de garde pour les nuits et week-ends lorsque cela s'applique ## Responsabilités principales - Installer, configurer et maintenir l'équipement serveur et réseau - Effectuer le câblage structuré (cuivre et fibre optique) - Exécuter les déploiements et décommissions de matériel - Surveiller les systèmes environnementaux (alimentation, refroidissement, sécurité) - Répondre aux incidents et effectuer le dépannage - Maintenir une documentation précise et le suivi des actifs - Collaborer avec les équipes d'ingénierie et d'exploitation - Participer à la planification de la capacité et aux mises à jour ## Exigences - 3+ années d'expérience dans les opérations de data center - Compétences avancées en câblage (Cat6/6a, OM3/OM4/OS2 fibre) - Capacités solides en dépannage et résolution de problèmes - Expérience avec les opérations rack et stack - Compréhension de la distribution d'énergie et des systèmes UPS - Excellentes compétences en documentation et communication - Capacité à soulever 50+ lbs et à travailler dans des environnements exigeants - Certifications data center (CDCP, CDCS, CDCE) - préférées - Certifications fournisseur (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - préférées - Certifications réseau (CCNA, JNCIA) - préférées - Expérience avec les plateformes DCIM - préférées - Connaissance des pratiques ITIL - préférées

jobs.description:
About the Role
 Join our team as a Data Center Technician in Dietikon, Switzerland . This is a full-time, on-site position where you'll support critical infrastructure at world-class data center facilities.
 Compensation & Benefits
 CHF80,000-100,000/year (CHF annual)
 Comprehensive benefits package including:
 
• Health, dental, and vision insurance

• Paid time off and holidays

• Professional development allowance

• Certification sponsorship

 Work Schedule
 
• Full-time permanent position

• Standard business hours with on-call rotation

• Shift differentials for nights/weekends when applicable

 Key Responsibilities
 
• Install, configure, and maintain server and network equipment

• Perform structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

• Execute hardware deployments and decommissions

• Monitor environmental systems (power, cooling, security)

• Respond to incidents and perform troubleshooting

• Maintain accurate documentation and asset tracking

• Collaborate with engineering and operations teams

• Participate in capacity planning and upgrades

Requirements:
• 3+ years data center operations experience

• Expert cabling skills (Cat6/6a, OM3/OM4/OS2 fiber)

• Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving abilities

• Experience with rack and stack operations

• Understanding of power distribution and UPS systems

• Excellent documentation and communication skills

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in demanding environments

• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, CDCE) - preferred

• Vendor certifications (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, JNCIA) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM platforms - preferred

• Knowledge of ITIL practices - preferred

jobs.description:
About the Role
 Join our team as a Data Center Technician in Duedingen, Switzerland . This is a full-time, on-site position where you'll support critical infrastructure at world-class data center facilities.
 Compensation & Benefits
 CHF80,000-100,000/year (CHF annual)
 Comprehensive benefits package including:
 
• Health, dental, and vision insurance

• Paid time off and holidays

• Professional development allowance

• Certification sponsorship

 Work Schedule
 
• Full-time permanent position

• Standard business hours with on-call rotation

• Shift differentials for nights/weekends when applicable

 Key Responsibilities
 
• Install, configure, and maintain server and network equipment

• Perform structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

• Execute hardware deployments and decommissions

• Monitor environmental systems (power, cooling, security)

• Respond to incidents and perform troubleshooting

• Maintain accurate documentation and asset tracking

• Collaborate with engineering and operations teams

• Participate in capacity planning and upgrades

Requirements:
• 3+ years data center operations experience

• Expert cabling skills (Cat6/6a, OM3/OM4/OS2 fiber)

• Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving abilities

• Experience with rack and stack operations

• Understanding of power distribution and UPS systems

• Excellent documentation and communication skills

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in demanding environments

• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, CDCE) - preferred

• Vendor certifications (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, JNCIA) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM platforms - preferred

• Knowledge of ITIL practices - preferred

Dies ist eine Vollzeitstelle vor Ort, bei der Sie die kritische Infrastruktur in weltklasse Rechenzentren unterstützen. ## Vergütung und Leistungen CHF80,000-100,000/Jahr (CHF jährlich) - Kranken-, Zahn- und Augenversicherung - Bezahlter Urlaub und Feiertage - Weiterbildungszuschüsse - Zertifizierungssponsoring - Standardarbeitszeit mit Bereitschaftsdienstrotation - Nachtschicht- und Wochenendzuschläge, falls zutreffend ## Arbeitszeit Unbefristete Vollzeitstelle ## Hauptverantwortlichkeiten - Installation, Konfiguration und Wartung von Server- und Netzwerkausrüstung - Durchführung von strukturierten Verkabelungen (Kupfer und Glasfaser) - Hardware-Deployment und -Decommissioning durchführen - Überwachung der Umweltbedingungen (Strom, Kühlung, Sicherheit) - Reaktion auf Vorfälle und Fehlerbehebung - Genaues Dokumentieren und Nachverfolgen von Aktivitäten - Zusammenarbeit mit Engineering- und Operations-Teams - Mitwirkung bei Kapazitätsplanung und Verbesserungen ## Anforderungen - 3+ Jahre Erfahrung in Rechenzentrumsbetrieb - Experte in Verkabelung (Cat6/6a, OM3/OM4/OS2 Glasfaser) - Starke Fähigkeiten in Fehlerbehebung und Troubleshooting - Erfahrung mit Rack- und Stack-Operationen - Verständnis von Stromverteilung und UPS-Systemen - Ausgezeichnete Dokumentations- und Kommunikationsfähigkeiten - Kraft zum Heben von über 50 lbs und Arbeiten in anspruchsvollen Umgebungen - Rechenzentrumszertifizierungen (CDCP, CDCS, CDCE) – bevorzugt

jobs.description:
About the Role
 We are seeking an experienced Data Center Technician for freelance/contract work in Gland, Switzerland . This is an on-site position supporting mission-critical infrastructure at premier data center facilities.
 Compensation
 CHF35-50/hr (CHF hourly)
 Rates vary based on experience level and project complexity. Emergency and after-hours work may qualify for premium rates.
 Engagement Type
 
• Contract/Freelance basis

• Flexible scheduling available

• Project-based or ongoing support

• Remote hands and smart hands services

 Key Responsibilities
 
• Perform hardware installations, decommissions, and migrations

• Execute structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

• Conduct server racking, stacking, and labeling

• Perform cross-connects and patch panel work

• Troubleshoot connectivity and hardware issues

• Document all work with photos and detailed notes

• Coordinate with remote NOC and client teams

Requirements:
• 2+ years data center or IT infrastructure experience

• Strong cabling skills (Cat5e/6/6a, single-mode/multi-mode fiber)

• Experience with server hardware (Dell, HP, Supermicro)

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in raised floor environments

• Own transportation and ability to work on-site

• Professional communication skills in English

• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, or similar) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, CompTIA Network+) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM and ticketing systems - preferred

• Familiarity with major colocation providers - preferred

• Standard tools: screwdrivers, cable testers, label makers, fiber inspection equipment

descriptionByLocale.it: Descrizione Siamo alla ricerca di un tecnico data center esperto per lavoro freelance/contrattuale a Gland, Svizzera. Questa è una posizione on-site che supporta infrastrutture critiche mission per centri dati di livello premier. ## Compensazione - CHF35-50/ora (CHF orario) - Le tariffe variano in base al livello di esperienza e alla complessità del progetto. - Il lavoro di emergenza e dopo ore di lavoro potrebbe qualificarsi per tariffe premium. ## Tipo di impegno - Basi di contratto/freelance - Flessibilità di orario disponibile - Supporto basato su progetto o continuativo - Servizi di mani remote e smart hands ## Mansioni - Eseguire installazioni, decommissioning e migrazioni di hardware - Eseguire cablaggi strutturati (copper e fibra ottica) - Eseguire racking, stacking e etichettatura di server - Eseguire connessioni incrociate e lavoro di pannello di patch - Risolvere problemi di connettività e hardware - Documentare tutto il lavoro con foto e note dettagliate - Coordinare con team NOC e clienti remoti ## Requisiti - 2+ anni di esperienza in data center o IT infrastructure - Abilità di cablaggio forte (Cat5e/6/6a, fibra ottica singola/multipla) - Esperienza con hardware di server (Dell, HP, Supermicro) - Capacità di sollevare 50+ lbs e lavorare in ambienti di piano rialzato - Proprio trasporto e capacità di lavorare sul posto - Abilità di comunicazione professionale in inglese - Certificazioni di data center (CDCP, CDCS, o simili) - preferito - Certificazioni di rete (CCNA, CompTIA Network+) - preferito - Esperienza con DCIM e sistemi di ticketing - preferito - Familiarità con principali fornitori di colocalizzazione - preferito ## Cosa offriamo - Strumenti standard: chiavi inglese, tester di cavo, etichettatori, attrezzatura di ispezione di fibra ## Contatto - (nessuna informazione di contatto specifica fornita)

Dies ist eine On-Site-Stelle, die mission-kritische Infrastruktur in Spitzen-Datenzentren unterstützt. ## Vergütung - CHF35-50/Stunde (CHF-Stunde) - Die Tarife variieren je nach Erfahrungsstufe und Projektkomplexität. - Notfall- und Nachtschichtarbeit kann für Premium-Tarife qualifizieren. ## Art der Beteiligung - Vertrags- bzw. freiberufliche Basis - Flexibles Zeitmanagement verfügbar - Projektbasiertes oder laufendes Support - Remote-Hands- und Smart-Hands-Dienste ## Aufgaben - Durchführen von Installations-, Demontage- und Migrationen von Hardware - Durchführen von strukturierten Kabelverbindungen (Kupfer und Glasfaser) - Durchführen von Server-Rack- und -Stack- und -Etikettierung - Durchführen von Kreuzverbindungen und Patch-Panel-Arbeit - Behebung von Verbindungs- und Hardware-Problemen - Dokumentieren des gesamten Arbeit mit Fotos und detaillierten Notizen - Koordination mit dem NOC-Team und entfernten Kunden ## Anforderungen - 2+ Jahre Erfahrung in Data Center oder IT-Infrastruktur - Starke Kabelverbindungsfähigkeiten (Cat5e/6/6a, Einzel- und Mehrfachfaser) - Erfahrung mit Server-Hardware (Dell, HP, Supermicro) - Fähigkeit, 50+ lbs zu heben und in erhöhten Fußbodenbereichen zu arbeiten - Eigener Transport und Fähigkeit, an Ort und Stelle zu arbeiten - Professionelle Kommunikationsfähigkeiten in Englisch - Data Center-Zertifizierungen (CDCP, CDCS oder ähnliche) - bevorzugt - Netzwerk-Zertifizierungen (CCNA, CompTIA Network+) - bevorzugt - Erfahrung mit DCIM und Ticketing-Systemen - bevorzugt - Bekanntschaft mit Hauptlieferanten von Colocation - bevorzugt ## Was wir bieten - Standardwerkzeuge: Schraubendreher, Kabeltester, Etikettierer, Glasfaser-Inspektionseinrichtungen ## Kontakt - (keine spezifische Kontaktinformationen bereitgestellt)
descriptionByLocale.fr: Description Nous recherchons un technicien data center expérimenté pour un travail freelance/contrat à Gland, en Suisse. C'est une position en site qui soutient les infrastructures critiques mission pour des centres de données de premier plan. ## Compensations - CHF35-50/heure (CHF heure) - Les tarifs varient en fonction du niveau d'expérience et de la complexité du projet. - Le travail d'urgence et les heures de nuit peuvent qualifier pour des tarifs premium. ## Type d'engagement - Bases de contrat/freelance - Horaires flexibles disponibles - Support basé sur le projet ou continu - Services de mains distantes et de mains intelligentes ## Tâches - Effectuer des installations, des décommissions et des migrations de matériel - Effectuer des câblages structurés (cuivre et fibre optique) - Effectuer des racking, des stacking et des étiquetages de serveurs - Effectuer des connexions croisées et des travaux de panneau de patch - Résoudre les problèmes de connectivité et de matériel - Documenter tout le travail avec des photos et des notes détaillées - Coordonner avec l'équipe NOC et les clients distants ## Exigences - 2+ ans d'expérience en data center ou infrastructure IT - Compétences en câblage fortes (Cat5e/6/6a, fibre optique simple/multiple) - Expérience avec le matériel de serveur (Dell, HP, Supermicro) - Capacité de soulever 50+ lbs et travailler dans des environnements de plancher élevé - Propre transport et capacité de travailler sur place - Compétences en communication professionnelle en anglais - Certifications de centre de données (CDCP, CDCS, ou similaires) - préférées - Certifications de réseau (CCNA, CompTIA Network+) - préférées - Expérience avec DCIM et systèmes de ticketing - préférées - Connaissance des principaux fournisseurs de colocation - préférées ## Ce que nous offrons - Outils standards : tournevis, testeurs de câble, étiqueteurs, équipement d'inspection de fibre ## Contact - (pas d'informations de contact spécifiques fournies)

jobs.description:
About the Role
 Join our team as a Data Center Technician in Gland, Switzerland . This is a full-time, on-site position where you'll support critical infrastructure at world-class data center facilities.
 Compensation & Benefits
 CHF80,000-100,000/year (CHF annual)
 Comprehensive benefits package including:
 
• Health, dental, and vision insurance

• Paid time off and holidays

• Professional development allowance

• Certification sponsorship

 Work Schedule
 
• Full-time permanent position

• Standard business hours with on-call rotation

• Shift differentials for nights/weekends when applicable

 Key Responsibilities
 
• Install, configure, and maintain server and network equipment

• Perform structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

• Execute hardware deployments and decommissions

• Monitor environmental systems (power, cooling, security)

• Respond to incidents and perform troubleshooting

• Maintain accurate documentation and asset tracking

• Collaborate with engineering and operations teams

• Participate in capacity planning and upgrades

Requirements:
• 3+ years data center operations experience

• Expert cabling skills (Cat6/6a, OM3/OM4/OS2 fiber)

• Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving abilities

• Experience with rack and stack operations

• Understanding of power distribution and UPS systems

• Excellent documentation and communication skills

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in demanding environments

• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, CDCE) - preferred

• Vendor certifications (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, JNCIA) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM platforms - preferred

• Knowledge of ITIL practices - preferred

jobs.description:
About the Role
 We are seeking an experienced Data Center Technician for freelance/contract work in Hünenberg, Switzerland . This is an on-site position supporting mission-critical infrastructure at premier data center facilities.
 Compensation
 CHF35-50/hr (CHF hourly)
 Rates vary based on experience level and project complexity. Emergency and after-hours work may qualify for premium rates.
 Engagement Type
 
• Contract/Freelance basis

• Flexible scheduling available

• Project-based or ongoing support

• Remote hands and smart hands services

 Key Responsibilities
 
• Perform hardware installations, decommissions, and migrations

• Execute structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

• Conduct server racking, stacking, and labeling

• Perform cross-connects and patch panel work

• Troubleshoot connectivity and hardware issues

• Document all work with photos and detailed notes

• Coordinate with remote NOC and client teams

Requirements:
• 2+ years data center or IT infrastructure experience

• Strong cabling skills (Cat5e/6/6a, single-mode/multi-mode fiber)

• Experience with server hardware (Dell, HP, Supermicro)

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in raised floor environments

• Own transportation and ability to work on-site

• Professional communication skills in English

• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, or similar) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, CompTIA Network+) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM and ticketing systems - preferred

• Familiarity with major colocation providers - preferred

• Standard tools: screwdrivers, cable testers, label makers, fiber inspection equipment

jobs.description:
About the Role
 Join our team as a Data Center Technician in Hünenberg, Switzerland . This is a full-time, on-site position where you'll support critical infrastructure at world-class data center facilities.
 Compensation & Benefits
 CHF80,000-100,000/year (CHF annual)
 Comprehensive benefits package including:
 
• Health, dental, and vision insurance

• Paid time off and holidays

• Professional development allowance

• Certification sponsorship

 Work Schedule
 
• Full-time permanent position

• Standard business hours with on-call rotation

• Shift differentials for nights/weekends when applicable

 Key Responsibilities
 
• Install, configure, and maintain server and network equipment

• Perform structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

• Execute hardware deployments and decommissions

• Monitor environmental systems (power, cooling, security)

• Respond to incidents and perform troubleshooting

• Maintain accurate documentation and asset tracking

• Collaborate with engineering and operations teams

• Participate in capacity planning and upgrades

Requirements:
• 3+ years data center operations experience

• Expert cabling skills (Cat6/6a, OM3/OM4/OS2 fiber)

• Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving abilities

• Experience with rack and stack operations

• Understanding of power distribution and UPS systems

• Excellent documentation and communication skills

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in demanding environments

• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, CDCE) - preferred

• Vendor certifications (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, JNCIA) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM platforms - preferred

• Knowledge of ITIL practices - preferred

descriptionByLocale.it: ## Descrizione Unisciti al nostro team come Tecnico Data Center a Hünenberg, Svizzera. Questa è una posizione a tempo pieno, in loco, in cui supporterai infrastrutture critiche in strutture di data center di livello mondiale. ## Cosa offriamo CHF 80.000-100.000/anno (CHF annuali) Pacchetto di benefit completo che include: - Assicurazione sanitaria, dentale e oftalmica - Ferieggiati retribuiti e festività - Indennità di sviluppo professionale - Sponsorizzazione certificazioni ## Orario di lavoro Posizione a tempo pieno permanente Orario di lavoro standard con turni di reperibilità Differenziali di turno per notti/weekend quando applicabile ## Mansioni - Installare, configurare e manutenere server e apparecchiature di rete - Eseguire cablaggi strutturati (rame e fibra ottica) - Eseguire implementazioni e dismissioni hardware - Monitorare i sistemi ambientali (alimentazione, raffreddamento, sicurezza) - Rispondere agli incidenti ed eseguire risoluzione dei problemi - Mantenere documentazione accurata e tracciamento asset - Collaborare con team di ingegneria e operazioni - Partecipare a pianificazione della capacità e aggiornamenti ## Requisiti - 3+ anni di esperienza in operazioni data center - Competenze esperte di cablaggio (Cat6/6a, fibra OM3/OM4/OS2) - Forti capacità di risoluzione problemi - Esperienza con operazioni rack and stack - Comprensione di distribuzione energia e sistemi UPS - Eccellenti capacità di documentazione e comunicazione - Capacità di sollevare 50+ libbre e lavorare in ambienti impegnativi - Certificazioni data center (CDCP, CDCS, CDCE) - preferite - Certificazioni vendor (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - preferite - Certificazioni di rete (CCNA, JNCIA) - preferite - Esperienza con piattaforme DCIM - preferita - Conoscenza delle pratiche ITIL - preferita

Dies ist eine Vollzeitstelle, die vor Ort arbeitet und unterstützt kritische Infrastruktur in weltweit führenden Data Center. ## Was wir bieten CHF 80.000-100.000/Jahr (CHF jährlich) Vollständiges Benefits-Paket, das Folgendes umfasst: - Kranken-, Zahn- und Augenversicherung - Bezahlte Urlaubstage und Feiertage - Berufsfortbildungszulage - Zertifizierungsförderung ## Arbeitszeit Vollzeitstelle mit fester Anstellung Standardarbeitszeit mit Bereitschaftsdiensten Schichtzulagen für Nächte/Wochenenden, wenn anwendbar ## Aufgaben - Installation, Konfiguration und Wartung von Servern und Netzwerkgeräten - Durchführung von strukturierten Verkabelungen (Kupfer und Glasfaser) - Durchführung von Hardware-Implementierungen und -Auflösungen - Überwachung der Umweltanlagen (Stromversorgung, Kühlung, Sicherheit) - Reaktion auf Vorfälle und Problembehebung - Erhalt und Aktualisierung von Dokumentationen und Asset-Tracking - Zusammenarbeit mit Ingenieur- und Operations-Teams - Teilnahme an Kapazitätsplanung und Updates ## Anforderungen - 3+ Jahre Erfahrung in Data Center-Betrieb - Expertenwissen in Verkabelung (Cat6/6a, OM3/OM4/OS2-Faser) - Starke Problembehebung und Lösungsfindung - Erfahrung mit Rack- und Stack-Betrieb - Verständnis von Stromverteilung und UPS-Systemen - Exzellente Dokumentations- und Kommunikationsfähigkeiten - Fähigkeit, 50+ Pfund zu heben und in anspruchsvollen Umgebungen zu arbeiten - Data Center-Zertifizierungen (CDCP, CDCS, CDCE) - bevorzugt - Vendor-Zertifizierungen (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - bevorzugt - Netzwerkzertifizierungen (CCNA, JNCIA) - bevorzugt - Erfahrung mit DCIM-Plattformen - bevorzugt - Kenntnisse der ITIL-Praktiken - bevorzugt

(CHF stündlich) - Die Tarife variieren je nach Erfahrungsebene und Projektkomplexität - Not- und Nachtdienst können zu Prämienqualifikationen führen ## Beschäftigungsart - Vertraglich/Freelance-Basis - Flexible Arbeitszeiten verfügbar - Projektbasierte oder kontinuierliche Unterstützung - Remote Hands und Smart Hands Services ## Hauptverantwortlichkeiten - Durchführen von Hardware-Installationen, Deinstallationen und Migrationen - Ausführen von strukturierten Verkabelungen (Kupfer und Glasfaser) - Durchführen von Server-Racking, Stacking und Beschriftung - Durchführen von Cross-Connects und Patch-Panel-Arbeiten - Beheben von Verbindungs- und Hardware-Problemen - Dokumentieren aller Arbeiten mit Fotos und detaillierten Notizen - Koordination mit Remote NOC und Kundenteams ## Anforderungen - 2+ Jahre Erfahrung im Data Center oder IT-Infrastruktur - Starke Verkabelungskenntnisse (Cat5e/6/6a, Single-Mode/Multi-Mode Fiber) - Erfahrung mit Server-Hardware (Dell, HP, Supermicro) - Fähigkeit, 50+ Pfund zu heben und in Raised-Floor-Umgebungen zu arbeiten - Eigenes Verkehrsmittel und Fähigkeit, vor Ort zu arbeiten - Professionelle Kommunikation in Englisch ## Vorzugsqualifikationen - Data Center-Zertifizierungen (CDCP, CDCS oder ähnlich) - Netzwerkzertifizierungen (CCNA, CompTIA Network+) - Erfahrung mit DCIM- und Ticketing-Systemen - Vertrautheit mit führenden Colocation-Anbietern ## Standardwerkzeuge - Schraubendreher - Kabeltester - Etikettenhersteller - Glasfaser-Inspektionsausrüstung
descriptionByLocale.fr: À propos du poste - Nous recherchons un technicien expérimenté en Data Center pour un travail en freelance/contrat à La Chaux-de-Fonds, Suisse - Il s'agit d'un poste sur site supportant l'infrastructure critique dans des installations de Data Center de premier ordre ## Rémunération - CHF35-50/heure (CHF horaire) - Les taux varient en fonction du niveau d'expérience et de la complexité du projet - Le travail d'urgence et après les heures peuvent qualifier pour des taux premium ## Type d'engagement - Sur une base de contrat/freelance - Horaires flexibles disponibles - Support basé sur projet ou continu - Services de mains à distance et smart hands ## Principales responsabilités - Effectuer des installations, des décommissions et des migrations de matériel - Exécuter des câblages structurés (cuivre et fibre optique) - Effectuer le racking, le stacking et l'étiquetage des serveurs - Effectuer des cross-connects et des travaux sur patch panel - Dépanner les problèmes de connectivité et de matériel - Documenter tout le travail avec des photos et des notes détaillées - Coordonner avec les équipes NOC à distance et les équipes clientes ## Exigences - 2+ ans d'expérience en Data Center ou en infrastructure IT - Solides compétences en câblage (Cat5e/6/6a, fibre simple/multi-mode) - Expérience avec le matériel serveur (Dell, HP, Supermicro) - Capacité à soulever 50+ livres et à travailler dans des environnements avec planchers surélevés - Propriétaire de son propre moyen de transport et capacité à travailler sur site - Compétences de communication professionnelle en anglais ## Qualifications préférées - Certifications Data Center (CDCP, CDCS ou similaire) - Certifications réseau (CCNA, CompTIA Network+) - Expérience avec les systèmes DCIM et de ticketing - Familiarité avec les principaux fournisseurs de colocation ## Outils standards - Tournevis - Testeurs de câbles - Fabricants d'étiquettes - Équipement d'inspection de fibre

jobs.description:
About the Role
 Join our team as a Data Center Technician in La Chaux-de-Fonds, Switzerland . This is a full-time, on-site position where you'll support critical infrastructure at world-class data center facilities.
 Compensation & Benefits
 CHF80,000-100,000/year (CHF annual)
 Comprehensive benefits package including:
 
• Health, dental, and vision insurance

• Paid time off and holidays

• Professional development allowance

• Certification sponsorship

 Work Schedule
 
• Full-time permanent position

• Standard business hours with on-call rotation

• Shift differentials for nights/weekends when applicable

 Key Responsibilities
 
• Install, configure, and maintain server and network equipment

• Perform structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

• Execute hardware deployments and decommissions

• Monitor environmental systems (power, cooling, security)

• Respond to incidents and perform troubleshooting

• Maintain accurate documentation and asset tracking

• Collaborate with engineering and operations teams

• Participate in capacity planning and upgrades

Requirements:
• 3+ years data center operations experience

• Expert cabling skills (Cat6/6a, OM3/OM4/OS2 fiber)

• Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving abilities

• Experience with rack and stack operations

• Understanding of power distribution and UPS systems

• Excellent documentation and communication skills

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in demanding environments

• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, CDCE) - preferred

• Vendor certifications (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, JNCIA) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM platforms - preferred

• Knowledge of ITIL practices - preferred

jobs.description:
About the Role
 Join our team as a Data Center Technician in Lausanne, Switzerland . This is a full-time, on-site position where you'll support critical infrastructure at world-class data center facilities.
 Compensation & Benefits
 CHF80,000-100,000/year (CHF annual)
 Comprehensive benefits package including:
 
• Health, dental, and vision insurance

• Paid time off and holidays

• Professional development allowance

• Certification sponsorship

 Work Schedule
 
• Full-time permanent position

• Standard business hours with on-call rotation

• Shift differentials for nights/weekends when applicable

 Key Responsibilities
 
• Install, configure, and maintain server and network equipment

• Perform structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

• Execute hardware deployments and decommissions

• Monitor environmental systems (power, cooling, security)

• Maintain accurate documentation and asset tracking

• Expert cabling skills (Cat6/6a, OM3/OM4/OS2 fiber)

• Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving abilities

• Experience with rack and stack operations

• Understanding of power distribution and UPS systems

• Excellent documentation and communication skills

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in demanding environments

• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, CDCE) - preferred

• Vendor certifications (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, JNCIA) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM platforms - preferred

• Knowledge of ITIL practices - preferred

jobs.description:
About the Role
 We are seeking an experienced Data Center Technician for freelance/contract work in Les Acacias, Switzerland . This is an on-site position supporting mission-critical infrastructure at premier data center facilities.
 Compensation
 CHF35-50/hr (CHF hourly)
 Rates vary based on experience level and project complexity. Emergency and after-hours work may qualify for premium rates.
 Engagement Type
 
• Contract/Freelance basis

• Flexible scheduling available

• Project-based or ongoing support

• Remote hands and smart hands services

 Key Responsibilities
 
• Perform hardware installations, decommissions, and migrations

• Execute structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

• Conduct server racking, stacking, and labeling

• Perform cross-connects and patch panel work

• Troubleshoot connectivity and hardware issues

• Document all work with photos and detailed notes

• Coordinate with remote NOC and client teams

Requirements:
• 2+ years data center or IT infrastructure experience

• Strong cabling skills (Cat5e/6/6a, single-mode/multi-mode fiber)

• Experience with server hardware (Dell, HP, Supermicro)

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in raised floor environments

• Own transportation and ability to work on-site

• Professional communication skills in English

• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, or similar) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, CompTIA Network+) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM and ticketing systems - preferred

• Familiarity with major colocation providers - preferred

• Standard tools: screwdrivers, cable testers, label makers, fiber inspection equipment

titleByLocale.it: Data Center Technician - Switzerland - Leuk Stadt - On-site

jobs.description:
About the Role
 We are seeking an experienced Data Center Technician for freelance/contract work in Leuk Stadt, Switzerland . This is an on-site position supporting mission-critical infrastructure at premier data center facilities.
 Compensation
 CHF35-50/hr (CHF hourly)
 Rates vary based on experience level and project complexity. Emergency and after-hours work may qualify for premium rates.
 Engagement Type
 
• Contract/Freelance basis

• Flexible scheduling available

• Project-based or ongoing support

• Remote hands and smart hands services

 Key Responsibilities
 
• Perform hardware installations, decommissions, and migrations

• Execute structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

• Conduct server racking, stacking, and labeling

• Perform cross-connects and patch panel work

• Troubleshoot connectivity and hardware issues

• Document all work with photos and detailed notes

• Coordinate with remote NOC and client teams

Requirements:
• 2+ years data center or IT infrastructure experience

• Strong cabling skills (Cat5e/6/6a, single-mode/multi-mode fiber)

• Experience with server hardware (Dell, HP, Supermicro)

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in raised floor environments

• Own transportation and ability to work on-site

• Professional communication skills in English

• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, or similar) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, CompTIA Network+) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM and ticketing systems - preferred

• Familiarity with major colocation providers - preferred

• Standard tools: screwdrivers, cable testers, label makers, fiber inspection equipment

About the Role
 Join our team as a Data Center Technician in Leuk Stadt, Switzerland . This is a full-time, on-site position where you'll support critical infrastructure at world-class data center facilities.
 Compensation & Benefits
 CHF80,000-100,000/year (CHF annual)
 Comprehensive benefits package including:
 
• Health, dental, and vision insurance

• Paid time off and holidays

• Professional development allowance

• Certification sponsorship

 Work Schedule
 
• Full-time permanent position

• Standard business hours with on-call rotation

• Shift differentials for nights/weekends when applicable

 Key Responsibilities
 
• Install, configure, and maintain server and network equipment

• Perform structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

• Execute hardware deployments and decommissions

• Monitor environmental systems (power, cooling, security)

• Respond to incidents and perform troubleshooting

• Maintain accurate documentation and asset tracking

• Collaborate with engineering and operations teams

• Participate in capacity planning and upgrades

Requirements:
• 3+ years data center operations experience

• Expert cabling skills (Cat6/6a, OM3/OM4/OS2 fiber)

• Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving abilities

• Experience with rack and stack operations

• Understanding of power distribution and UPS systems

• Excellent documentation and communication skills

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in demanding environments

• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, CDCE) - preferred

• Vendor certifications (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, JNCIA) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM platforms - preferred

• Knowledge of ITIL practices - preferred

 Join our team as a Data Center Technician in Linthal, Switzerland . This is a full-time, on-site position where you'll support critical infrastructure at world-class data center facilities.

• Network certifications (CCNA, JNCIA) - preferred

• Knowledge of ITIL practices - preferred

jobs.description:
About the Role
 We are seeking an experienced Data Center Technician for freelance/contract work in Luzern, Switzerland . This is an on-site position supporting mission-critical infrastructure at premier data center facilities.
 Compensation
 CHF35-50/hr (CHF hourly)
 Rates vary based on experience level and project complexity. Emergency and after-hours work may qualify for premium rates.
 Engagement Type
 
• Contract/Freelance basis

• Flexible scheduling available

• Project-based or ongoing support

• Remote hands and smart hands services

 Key Responsibilities
 
• Perform hardware installations, decommissions, and migrations

• Execute structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

• Conduct server racking, stacking, and labeling

• Perform cross-connects and patch panel work

• Troubleshoot connectivity and hardware issues

• Document all work with photos and detailed notes

• Coordinate with remote NOC and client teams

Requirements:
• 2+ years data center or IT infrastructure experience

• Strong cabling skills (Cat5e/6/6a, single-mode/multi-mode fiber)

• Experience with server hardware (Dell, HP, Supermicro)

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in raised floor environments

• Own transportation and ability to work on-site

• Professional communication skills in English

• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, or similar) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, CompTIA Network+) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM and ticketing systems - preferred

• Familiarity with major colocation providers - preferred

• Standard tools: screwdrivers, cable testers, label makers, fiber inspection equipment

titleByLocale.fr: Technicien des centres de données - Suisse - Lucerne - On-site

jobs.description:
About the Role
 Join our team as a Data Center Technician in Luzern, Switzerland . This is a full-time, on-site position where you'll support critical infrastructure at world-class data center facilities.
 Compensation & Benefits
 CHF80,000-100,000/year (CHF annual)
 Comprehensive benefits package including:
 
• Health, dental, and vision insurance

• Paid time off and holidays

• Professional development allowance

• Certification sponsorship

 Work Schedule
 
• Full-time permanent position

• Standard business hours with on-call rotation

• Shift differentials for nights/weekends when applicable

 Key Responsibilities
 
• Install, configure, and maintain server and network equipment

• Perform structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

• Execute hardware deployments and decommissions

• Monitor environmental systems (power, cooling, security)

• Respond to incidents and perform troubleshooting

• Maintain accurate documentation and asset tracking

• Collaborate with engineering and operations teams

• Participate in capacity planning and upgrades

Requirements:
• 3+ years data center operations experience

• Expert cabling skills (Cat6/6a, OM3/OM4/OS2 fiber)

• Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving abilities

• Experience with rack and stack operations

• Understanding of power distribution and UPS systems

• Excellent documentation and communication skills

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in demanding environments

• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, CDCE) - preferred

• Vendor certifications (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, JNCIA) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM platforms - preferred

• Knowledge of ITIL practices - preferred

descriptionByLocale.it: Siamo alla ricerca di un Tecnico Data Center per il nostro team a Luzern, Svizzera. Questo è un incarico a tempo pieno, on-site, dove supporterai l'infrastruttura critica in centri dati di livello mondiale. titleByLocale.it: Data Center Technician - Svizzera - Manno - In loco
titleByLocale.en: Data Center Technician - Switzerland - Manno - On-site
titleByLocale.de: Data Center Techniker - Switzerland - Manno - On-site
titleByLocale.fr: Technicien en centre de données - Suisse - Manno - Sur place

jobs.description:
About the Role
 We are seeking an experienced Data Center Technician for freelance/contract work in Manno, Switzerland . This is an on-site position supporting mission-critical infrastructure at premier data center facilities.
 Compensation
 CHF35-50/hr (CHF hourly)
 Rates vary based on experience level and project complexity. Emergency and after-hours work may qualify for premium rates.
 Engagement Type
 
• Contract/Freelance basis

• Flexible scheduling available

• Project-based or ongoing support

• Remote hands and smart hands services

 Key Responsibilities
 
• Perform hardware installations, decommissions, and migrations

• Execute structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

• Conduct server racking, stacking, and labeling

• Perform cross-connects and patch panel work

• Troubleshoot connectivity and hardware issues

• Document all work with photos and detailed notes

• Coordinate with remote NOC and client teams

Requirements:
• 2+ years data center or IT infrastructure experience

• Strong cabling skills (Cat5e/6/6a, single-mode/multi-mode fiber)

• Experience with server hardware (Dell, HP, Supermicro)

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in raised floor environments

• Own transportation and ability to work on-site

• Professional communication skills in English

• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, or similar) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, CompTIA Network+) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM and ticketing systems - preferred

• Familiarity with major colocation providers - preferred

• Standard tools: screwdrivers, cable testers, label makers, fiber inspection equipment

descriptionByLocale.it: Siamo alla ricerca di un esperto Data Center Technician per lavori freelance/contrattuali a Manno, Svizzera . Si tratta di una posizione in loco che supporta l'infrastruttura mission-critical presso le principali strutture data center. Compensazione CHF35-50/ora (CHF oraria) I tassi variano in base al livello di esperienza e alla complessità del progetto. Il lavoro di emergenza e dopo-ore può beneficiare di tariffe premium. Tipo di partecipazione Contratto/Liberanza base Schedulazione flessibile disponibile Supporto basato sul progetto o in corso Mani remote e servizi di mani intelligenti Responsabilità chiave Eseguire installazioni hardware, decommissioni e migrazioni Esegui cablaggio strutturato (copper e fibra ottica) Conduct server racking, stacking, e l'etichettatura Perform cross-connects and patch panel work Troubleshoot connettività e problemi hardware Documento tutto funziona con le foto e note dettagliate Coordinate con i team di remoto NOC e client Requisiti: 2 anni data center o IT infrastruttura esperienza Forte capacità di cablaggio (Cat5e/6/6a, single-mode/multi-mode fiber) Esperienza con hardware server (Dell, HP, Supermicro) Capacità di sollevare 50+ lbs e lavorare in ambienti rialzati Trasporto e capacità di lavorare in loco Capacità di comunicazione professionale in inglese Certificazioni di data center (CDCP, CDCS, o simili) - Preferite Certificazioni di rete (CCNA, CompTIA Network+) - Esperienza preferita con DCIM e sistemi di biglietteria - preferito Familiarity con i principali fornitori di test di colocation - preferito Strumenti standard: cacciaviti

descriptionByLocale.de: Über die Rolle Wir suchen einen erfahrenen Data Center Technician für freiberufliche/Vertragsarbeit in Manno, Schweiz . Es handelt sich um eine Position vor Ort, die missionskritische Infrastrukturen in erstklassigen Rechenzentren unterstützt. Vergütung CHF35-50/h (CHF stündlich) Die Preise variieren je nach Erfahrungsniveau und Projektkomplexität. Notfall- und Nachstundenarbeit kann für Prämientarife qualifizieren. descriptionByLocale.fr: À propos du rôle Nous recherchons un technicien expérimenté en Data Center pour le travail indépendant/contrat à Manno, Suisse. Il s'agit d'une position sur place qui appuie l'infrastructure essentielle de la mission dans les installations des centres de données de premier plan. Rémunération 35-50 CHF/h (CHF horaire) Les taux varient selon le niveau d'expérience et la complexité du projet. Les travaux d'urgence et les travaux après les heures de travail peuvent bénéficier de primes. Type d'engagement Base de contrat / freelance Programmation flexible disponible Support continu ou basé sur le projet Services à distance et mains intelligentes Principales responsabilités Effectuer des installations matérielles, des déclassements et des migrations Exécuter le câblage structuré (cuivre et fibre optique) Effectuer le racking, l'empilage et l'étiquetage des serveurs Effectuer des connections croisées et des travaux de panneaux de patch Dépannage des problèmes de connectivité et de matériel Documenter tous les travaux avec des photos et des notes détaillées Coordonner avec les équipes clientes et CNO distantes Exigences : 2+ ans d'expérience en data center ou en infrastructure informatique Fortes compétences en câblage (Cat5e/6/6a, fibre monomode/multimode) Expérience avec le matériel serveur (Dell, HP, Supermicro) Capacité de soulever 50 lbs et de travailler dans des environnements surélevés Propre transport et capacité de travailler sur place Compétences professionnelles en communication en anglais Certifications de centres de données (CDCP, CDCS, ou similaire) - certifications de réseau préférées (CCNA, CompTIA Network+) - expérience préférée avec DCIM et systèmes de billetterie - familiarité préférée avec les principaux fournisseurs de colocation - outils de référence : tournevis, testeurs de câbles, fabricants d'étiquettes, matériel d'inspection des fibres

jobs.description:
About the Role
 We are seeking an experienced Data Center Technician for freelance/contract work in Melano, Switzerland . This is an on-site position supporting mission-critical infrastructure at premier data center facilities.
 Compensation
 CHF35-50/hr (CHF hourly)
 Rates vary based on experience level and project complexity. Emergency and after-hours work may qualify for premium rates.
 Engagement Type
 
• Contract/Freelance basis

• Flexible scheduling available

• Project-based or ongoing support

• Remote hands and smart hands services

 Key Responsibilities
 
• Perform hardware installations, decommissions, and migrations

• Execute structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

• Conduct server racking, stacking, and labeling

• Perform cross-connects and patch panel work

• Troubleshoot connectivity and hardware issues

• Document all work with photos and detailed notes

• Coordinate with remote NOC and client teams

Requirements:
• 2+ years data center or IT infrastructure experience

• Strong cabling skills (Cat5e/6/6a, single-mode/multi-mode fiber)

• Experience with server hardware (Dell, HP, Supermicro)

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in raised floor environments

• Own transportation and ability to work on-site

• Professional communication skills in English

• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, or similar) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, CompTIA Network+) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM and ticketing systems - preferred

• Familiarity with major colocation providers - preferred

• Standard tools: screwdrivers, cable testers, label makers, fiber inspection equipment

descriptionByLocale.it: Informazioni sul ruolo Stiamo cercando un tecnico esperto di data center per lavori freelance/a contratto a Melano, in Svizzera . Questa è una posizione in loco che supporta l'infrastruttura mission-critical presso le principali strutture del data center. Compenso CHF 35-50/ora (CHF orario) Le tariffe variano in base al livello di esperienza e alla complessità del progetto. I lavori di emergenza e fuori orario possono beneficiare di tariffe premium. Tipo di impegno Base contrattuale/freelance Pianificazione flessibile disponibile Supporto basato su progetto o continuo Mani in remoto e servizi di mani intelligenti Responsabilità chiave Eseguire installazioni hardware, decommissioni e migrazioni Eseguire cablaggi strutturati (rame e fibra ottica) Condurre rack, impilamento ed etichettatura del server Eseguire connessioni incrociate e lavoro del pannello patch Risolvere i problemi di connettività e hardware Documentare tutto il lavoro con foto e note dettagliate Coordinarsi con i team NOC e client remoti Requisiti: 2+ anni di esperienza nel data center o nell'infrastruttura IT Forti capacità di cablaggio (Cat5e/6/6a, fibra monomodale/multimodale) Esperienza con l'hardware del server (Dell, HP, Supermicro) Capacità di sollevare oltre 50 libbre e lavorare in ambienti sopraelevati Trasporto proprio e capacità di lavorare in loco Competenze di comunicazione professionale nelle certificazioni dei data center inglesi (CDCP, CDCS o simili) - certificazioni di rete preferite (CCNA, CompTIA Network+) - Esperienza preferita con i sistemi DCIM e di ticketing - Familiarità preferita con i principali fornitori di colocation - Strumenti standard preferiti:

jobs.description:
About the Role
 Join our team as a Data Center Technician in Manno, Switzerland . This is a full-time, on-site position where you'll support critical infrastructure at world-class data center facilities.
 Compensation & Benefits
 CHF80,000-100,000/year (CHF annual)
 Comprehensive benefits package including:
 
• Health, dental, and vision insurance

• Paid time off and holidays

• Professional development allowance

• Certification sponsorship

 Work Schedule
 
• Full-time permanent position

• Standard business hours with on-call rotation

• Shift differentials for nights/weekends when applicable

 Key Responsibilities
 
• Install, configure, and maintain server and network equipment

• Perform structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

• Execute hardware deployments and decommissions

• Monitor environmental systems (power, cooling, security)

• Respond to incidents and perform troubleshooting

• Maintain accurate documentation and asset tracking

• Collaborate with engineering and operations teams

• Participate in capacity planning and upgrades

Requirements:
• 3+ years data center operations experience

• Expert cabling skills (Cat6/6a, OM3/OM4/OS2 fiber)

• Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving abilities

• Experience with rack and stack operations

• Understanding of power distribution and UPS systems

• Excellent documentation and communication skills

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in demanding environments

• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, CDCE) - preferred

• Vendor certifications (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, JNCIA) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM platforms - preferred

• Knowledge of ITIL practices - preferred
