jobs.description:
About the Role
 Join our team as a Data Center Technician in Muttenz, Switzerland . This is a full-time, on-site position where you'll support critical infrastructure at world-class data center facilities.
 Compensation & Benefits
 CHF80,000-100,000/year (CHF annual)
 Comprehensive benefits package including:
 
• Health, dental, and vision insurance

• Paid time off and holidays

• Professional development allowance

• Certification sponsorship

 Work Schedule
 
• Full-time permanent position

• Standard business hours with on-call rotation

• Shift differentials for nights/weekends when applicable

 Key Responsibilities
 
• Install, configure, and maintain server and network equipment

• Perform structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

• Execute hardware deployments and decommissions

• Monitor environmental systems (power, cooling, security)

• Respond to incidents and perform troubleshooting

• Maintain accurate documentation and asset tracking

• Collaborate with engineering and operations teams

• Participate in capacity planning and upgrades

Requirements:
• 3+ years data center operations experience

• Expert cabling skills (Cat6/6a, OM3/OM4/OS2 fiber)

• Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving abilities

• Experience with rack and stack operations

• Understanding of power distribution and UPS systems

• Excellent documentation and communication skills

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in demanding environments

• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, CDCE) - preferred

• Vendor certifications (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, JNCIA) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM platforms - preferred

• Knowledge of ITIL practices - preferred

jobs.description:
About the Role
 We are seeking an experienced Data Center Technician for freelance/contract work in Münchenstein, Switzerland . This is an on-site position supporting mission-critical infrastructure at premier data center facilities.
 Compensation
 CHF35-50/hr (CHF hourly)
 Rates vary based on experience level and project complexity. Emergency and after-hours work may qualify for premium rates.
 Engagement Type
 
• Contract/Freelance basis

• Flexible scheduling available

• Project-based or ongoing support

• Remote hands and smart hands services

 Key Responsibilities
 
• Perform hardware installations, decommissions, and migrations

• Execute structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

• Conduct server racking, stacking, and labeling

• Perform cross-connects and patch panel work

• Troubleshoot connectivity and hardware issues

• Document all work with photos and detailed notes

• Coordinate with remote NOC and client teams

Requirements:
• 2+ years data center or IT infrastructure experience

• Strong cabling skills (Cat5e/6/6a, single-mode/multi-mode fiber)

• Experience with server hardware (Dell, HP, Supermicro)

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in raised floor environments

• Own transportation and ability to work on-site

• Professional communication skills in English

• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, or similar) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, CompTIA Network+) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM and ticketing systems - preferred

• Familiarity with major colocation providers - preferred

• Standard tools: screwdrivers, cable testers, label makers, fiber inspection equipment

jobs.description:
About the Role
 We are seeking an experienced Data Center Technician for freelance/contract work in Olten, Switzerland . This is an on-site position supporting mission-critical infrastructure at premier data center facilities.
 Compensation
 CHF35-50/hr (CHF hourly)
 Rates vary based on experience level and project complexity. Emergency and after-hours work may qualify for premium rates.
 Engagement Type
 
• Contract/Freelance basis

• Flexible scheduling available

• Project-based or ongoing support

• Remote hands and smart hands services

 Key Responsibilities
 
• Perform hardware installations, decommissions, and migrations

• Execute structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

• Conduct server racking, stacking, and labeling

• Perform cross-connects and patch panel work

• Troubleshoot connectivity and hardware issues

• Document all work with photos and detailed notes

• Coordinate with remote NOC and client teams

Requirements:
• 2+ years data center or IT infrastructure experience

• Strong cabling skills (Cat5e/6/6a, single-mode/multi-mode fiber)

• Experience with server hardware (Dell, HP, Supermicro)

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in raised floor environments

• Own transportation and ability to work on-site

• Professional communication skills in English

• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, or similar) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, CompTIA Network+) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM and ticketing systems - preferred

• Familiarity with major colocation providers - preferred

• Standard tools: screwdrivers, cable testers, label makers, fiber inspection equipment

jobs.description:
About the Role
 We are seeking an experienced Data Center Technician for freelance/contract work in Plan-les-Ouates, Switzerland . This is an on-site position supporting mission-critical infrastructure at premier data center facilities.
 Compensation
 CHF35-50/hr (CHF hourly)
 Rates vary based on experience level and project complexity. Emergency and after-hours work may qualify for premium rates.
 Engagement Type
 
• Contract/Freelance basis

• Flexible scheduling available

• Project-based or ongoing support

• Remote hands and smart hands services

 Key Responsibilities
 
• Perform hardware installations, decommissions, and migrations

• Execute structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

• Conduct server racking, stacking, and labeling

• Perform cross-connects and patch panel work

• Troubleshoot connectivity and hardware issues

• Document all work with photos and detailed notes

• Coordinate with remote NOC and client teams

Requirements:
• 2+ years data center or IT infrastructure experience

• Strong cabling skills (Cat5e/6/6a, single-mode/multi-mode fiber)

• Experience with server hardware (Dell, HP, Supermicro)

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in raised floor environments

• Own transportation and ability to work on-site

• Professional communication skills in English

• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, or similar) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, CompTIA Network+) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM and ticketing systems - preferred

• Familiarity with major colocation providers - preferred

• Standard tools: screwdrivers, cable testers, label makers, fiber inspection equipment

Compensazione CHF35-50/ora (CHF oraria) I tassi variano in base al livello di esperienza e alla complessità del progetto. Il lavoro di emergenza e dopo-ore può beneficiare di tariffe premium. jobs.description:
About the Role
 Join our team as a Data Center Technician in Plan-les-Ouates, Switzerland . This is a full-time, on-site position where you'll support critical infrastructure at world-class data center facilities.
 Compensation & Benefits
 CHF80,000-100,000/year (CHF annual)
 Comprehensive benefits package including:
 
• Health, dental, and vision insurance

• Paid time off and holidays

• Professional development allowance

• Certification sponsorship

 Work Schedule
 
• Full-time permanent position

• Standard business hours with on-call rotation

• Shift differentials for nights/weekends when applicable

 Key Responsibilities
 
• Install, configure, and maintain server and network equipment

• Perform structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

• Execute hardware deployments and decommissions

• Monitor environmental systems (power, cooling, security)

• Respond to incidents and perform troubleshooting

• Maintain accurate documentation and asset tracking

• Collaborate with engineering and operations teams

• Participate in capacity planning and upgrades

Requirements:
• 3+ years data center operations experience

• Expert cabling skills (Cat6/6a, OM3/OM4/OS2 fiber)

• Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving abilities

• Experience with rack and stack operations

• Understanding of power distribution and UPS systems

• Excellent documentation and communication skills

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in demanding environments

• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, CDCE) - preferred

• Vendor certifications (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, JNCIA) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM platforms - preferred

• Knowledge of ITIL practices - preferred

jobs.description:
About the Role
 Join our team as a Data Center Technician in Pratteln, Switzerland . This is a full-time, on-site position where you'll support critical infrastructure at world-class data center facilities.
 Compensation & Benefits
 CHF80,000-100,000/year (CHF annual)
 Comprehensive benefits package including:
 
• Health, dental, and vision insurance

• Paid time off and holidays

• Professional development allowance

• Certification sponsorship

 Work Schedule
 
• Full-time permanent position

• Standard business hours with on-call rotation

• Shift differentials for nights/weekends when applicable

 Key Responsibilities
 
• Install, configure, and maintain server and network equipment

• Perform structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

• Execute hardware deployments and decommissions

• Monitor environmental systems (power, cooling, security)

• Respond to incidents and perform troubleshooting

• Maintain accurate documentation and asset tracking

• Collaborate with engineering and operations teams

• Participate in capacity planning and upgrades

Requirements:
• 3+ years data center operations experience

• Expert cabling skills (Cat6/6a, OM3/OM4/OS2 fiber)

• Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving abilities

• Experience with rack and stack operations

• Understanding of power distribution and UPS systems

• Excellent documentation and communication skills

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in demanding environments

• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, CDCE) - preferred

• Vendor certifications (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, JNCIA) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM platforms - preferred

• Knowledge of ITIL practices - preferred

About the Role
 We are seeking an experienced Data Center Technician for freelance/contract work in Rafz, Switzerland . This is an on-site position supporting mission-critical infrastructure at premier data center facilities.
 Compensation
 CHF35-50/hr (CHF hourly)

• Flexible scheduling available

• Project-based or ongoing support

• Remote hands and smart hands services

• Conduct server racking, stacking, and labeling

• Perform cross-connects and patch panel work

• Document all work with photos and detailed notes

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in raised floor environments

• Own transportation and ability to work on-site

• Professional communication skills in English

• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, or similar) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, CompTIA Network+) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM and ticketing systems - preferred

• Familiarity with major colocation providers - preferred

• Standard tools: screwdrivers, cable testers, label makers, fiber inspection equipment

 Join our team as a Data Center Technician in Rafz, Switzerland . This is a full-time, on-site position where you'll support critical infrastructure at world-class data center facilities.

 CHF80,000-100,000/year (CHF annual)

jobs.description:
About the Role
 We are seeking an experienced Data Center Technician for freelance/contract work in Rotkreuz, Switzerland . This is an on-site position supporting mission-critical infrastructure at premier data center facilities.
 Compensation
 CHF35-50/hr (CHF hourly)
 Rates vary based on experience level and project complexity. Emergency and after-hours work may qualify for premium rates.
 Engagement Type
 
• Contract/Freelance basis

• Flexible scheduling available

• Project-based or ongoing support

• Remote hands and smart hands services

 Key Responsibilities
 
• Perform hardware installations, decommissions, and migrations

• Execute structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

• Conduct server racking, stacking, and labeling

• Perform cross-connects and patch panel work

• Troubleshoot connectivity and hardware issues

• Document all work with photos and detailed notes

• Coordinate with remote NOC and client teams

Requirements:
• 2+ years data center or IT infrastructure experience

• Strong cabling skills (Cat5e/6/6a, single-mode/multi-mode fiber)

• Experience with server hardware (Dell, HP, Supermicro)

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in raised floor environments

• Own transportation and ability to work on-site

• Professional communication skills in English

• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, or similar) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, CompTIA Network+) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM and ticketing systems - preferred

• Familiarity with major colocation providers - preferred

• Standard tools: screwdrivers, cable testers, label makers, fiber inspection equipment

jobs.description:
About the Role
 We are seeking an experienced Data Center Technician for freelance/contract work in Ruswil, Switzerland . This is an on-site position supporting mission-critical infrastructure at premier data center facilities.
 Compensation
 CHF35-50/hr (CHF hourly)
 Rates vary based on experience level and project complexity. Emergency and after-hours work may qualify for premium rates.
 Engagement Type
 
• Contract/Freelance basis

• Flexible scheduling available

• Project-based or ongoing support

• Remote hands and smart hands services

 Key Responsibilities
 
• Perform hardware installations, decommissions, and migrations

• Execute structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

• Conduct server racking, stacking, and labeling

• Perform cross-connects and patch panel work

• Troubleshoot connectivity and hardware issues

• Document all work with photos and detailed notes

• Coordinate with remote NOC and client teams

Requirements:
• 2+ years data center or IT infrastructure experience

• Strong cabling skills (Cat5e/6/6a, single-mode/multi-mode fiber)

• Experience with server hardware (Dell, HP, Supermicro)

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in raised floor environments

• Own transportation and ability to work on-site

• Professional communication skills in English

• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, or similar) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, CompTIA Network+) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM and ticketing systems - preferred

• Familiarity with major colocation providers - preferred

• Standard tools: screwdrivers, cable testers, label makers, fiber inspection equipment

jobs.description:
About the Role
 Join our team as a Data Center Technician in Ruswil, Switzerland . This is a full-time, on-site position where you'll support critical infrastructure at world-class data center facilities.
 Compensation & Benefits
 CHF80,000-100,000/year (CHF annual)
 Comprehensive benefits package including:
 
• Health, dental, and vision insurance

• Paid time off and holidays

• Professional development allowance

• Certification sponsorship

 Work Schedule
 
• Full-time permanent position

• Standard business hours with on-call rotation

• Shift differentials for nights/weekends when applicable

 Key Responsibilities
 
• Install, configure, and maintain server and network equipment

• Perform structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

• Execute hardware deployments and decommissions

• Monitor environmental systems (power, cooling, security)

• Respond to incidents and perform troubleshooting

• Maintain accurate documentation and asset tracking

• Collaborate with engineering and operations teams

• Participate in capacity planning and upgrades

Requirements:
• 3+ years data center operations experience

• Expert cabling skills (Cat6/6a, OM3/OM4/OS2 fiber)

• Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving abilities

• Experience with rack and stack operations

• Understanding of power distribution and UPS systems

• Excellent documentation and communication skills

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in demanding environments

• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, CDCE) - preferred

• Vendor certifications (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, JNCIA) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM platforms - preferred

• Knowledge of ITIL practices - preferred

jobs.description:
About the Role
 Join our team as a Data Center Technician in Schaffhausen, Switzerland . This is a full-time, on-site position where you'll support critical infrastructure at world-class data center facilities.
 Compensation & Benefits
 CHF80,000-100,000/year (CHF annual)
 Comprehensive benefits package including:
 
• Health, dental, and vision insurance

• Paid time off and holidays

• Professional development allowance

• Certification sponsorship

 Work Schedule
 
• Full-time permanent position

• Standard business hours with on-call rotation

• Shift differentials for nights/weekends when applicable

 Key Responsibilities
 
• Install, configure, and maintain server and network equipment

• Perform structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

• Execute hardware deployments and decommissions

• Monitor environmental systems (power, cooling, security)

• Respond to incidents and perform troubleshooting

• Maintain accurate documentation and asset tracking

• Collaborate with engineering and operations teams

• Participate in capacity planning and upgrades

Requirements:
• 3+ years data center operations experience

• Expert cabling skills (Cat6/6a, OM3/OM4/OS2 fiber)

• Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving abilities

• Experience with rack and stack operations

• Understanding of power distribution and UPS systems

• Excellent documentation and communication skills

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in demanding environments

• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, CDCE) - preferred

• Vendor certifications (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, JNCIA) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM platforms - preferred

• Knowledge of ITIL practices - preferred

About the Role
 We are seeking an experienced Data Center Technician for freelance/contract work in Schenkon, Switzerland . This is an on-site position supporting mission-critical infrastructure at premier data center facilities.
 Compensation
 CHF35-50/hr (CHF hourly)
 Rates vary based on experience level and project complexity. Emergency and after-hours work may qualify for premium rates.
 Engagement Type
 
• Contract/Freelance basis

• Flexible scheduling available

• Project-based or ongoing support

• Remote hands and smart hands services

 Key Responsibilities
 
• Perform hardware installations, decommissions, and migrations

• Execute structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

• Conduct server racking, stacking, and labeling

• Perform cross-connects and patch panel work

• Troubleshoot connectivity and hardware issues

• Document all work with photos and detailed notes

• Experience with server hardware (Dell, HP, Supermicro)

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in raised floor environments

• Own transportation and ability to work on-site

• Professional communication skills in English

• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, or similar) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, CompTIA Network+) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM and ticketing systems - preferred

• Familiarity with major colocation providers - preferred

• Standard tools: screwdrivers, cable testers, label makers, fiber inspection equipment

jobs.description:
About the Role
 Join our team as a Data Center Technician in Schenkon, Switzerland . This is a full-time, on-site position where you'll support critical infrastructure at world-class data center facilities.
 Compensation & Benefits
 CHF80,000-100,000/year (CHF annual)
 Comprehensive benefits package including:
 
• Health, dental, and vision insurance

• Paid time off and holidays

• Professional development allowance

• Certification sponsorship

 Work Schedule
 
• Full-time permanent position

• Standard business hours with on-call rotation

• Shift differentials for nights/weekends when applicable

 Key Responsibilities
 
• Install, configure, and maintain server and network equipment

• Perform structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

• Execute hardware deployments and decommissions

• Monitor environmental systems (power, cooling, security)

• Respond to incidents and perform troubleshooting

• Maintain accurate documentation and asset tracking

• Collaborate with engineering and operations teams

• Participate in capacity planning and upgrades

Requirements:
• 3+ years data center operations experience

• Expert cabling skills (Cat6/6a, OM3/OM4/OS2 fiber)

• Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving abilities

• Experience with rack and stack operations

• Understanding of power distribution and UPS systems

• Excellent documentation and communication skills

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in demanding environments

• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, CDCE) - preferred

• Vendor certifications (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, JNCIA) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM platforms - preferred

• Knowledge of ITIL practices - preferred

jobs.description:
About the Role
 We are seeking an experienced Data Center Technician for freelance/contract work in Schlieren, Switzerland . This is an on-site position supporting mission-critical infrastructure at premier data center facilities.
 Compensation
 CHF35-50/hr (CHF hourly)
 Rates vary based on experience level and project complexity. Emergency and after-hours work may qualify for premium rates.
 Engagement Type
 
• Contract/Freelance basis

• Flexible scheduling available

• Project-based or ongoing support

• Remote hands and smart hands services

 Key Responsibilities
 
• Perform hardware installations, decommissions, and migrations

• Execute structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

• Conduct server racking, stacking, and labeling

• Perform cross-connects and patch panel work

• Troubleshoot connectivity and hardware issues

• Document all work with photos and detailed notes

• Coordinate with remote NOC and client teams

Requirements:
• 2+ years data center or IT infrastructure experience

• Strong cabling skills (Cat5e/6/6a, single-mode/multi-mode fiber)

• Experience with server hardware (Dell, HP, Supermicro)

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in raised floor environments

• Own transportation and ability to work on-site

• Professional communication skills in English

• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, or similar) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, CompTIA Network+) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM and ticketing systems - preferred

• Familiarity with major colocation providers - preferred

• Standard tools: screwdrivers, cable testers, label makers, fiber inspection equipment

Rémunération et avantages sociaux 80 000 à 100 000 francs par an (CHF annuel) Trousse complète d'avantages, y compris : assurance-santé, soins dentaires et assurance-visialité Paid time off et jours fériés Indemnité de perfectionnement professionnel Programme de parrainage de travail Postes permanents à temps plein Heures d'ouverture standard avec rotation sur appel Écarts de poste pour les nuits et les week-ends, le cas échéant Principales responsabilités Installer, configurer et entretenir le serveur et l'équipement de réseau Effectuer le câblage structuré (cuivre et fibre optique) Déploiement et déclassement du matériel Exécuter les systèmes de contrôle de l'environnement (puissance, refroidissement, sécurité) Répondre aux incidents et effectuer le dépannage Maintenir la documentation exacte et le suivi des biens Collaborer avec les équipes d'ingénierie et d'exploitation Participer à la planification et à la mise à niveau des capacités Exigences : 3+ ans d'expérience opérationnelle du centre de données Compétences de câblage expertes (Cat6/6a, OM3/OM4/OS2) Capacités solides de résolution de problèmes et de résolution de problèmes Expérience de l'exploitation du rack et de la pile Comprendre les systèmes de distribution d'électricité et d'UPS Excellente capacité de documentation et de communication Capacité de soulever 50 lbs et de travailler dans des environnements exigeants Certifications de centres de données (CDCP, CDCS, CDCE) - certifications de fournisseurs préférées (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - certifications de réseaux préférées (CCNA, JNCIA) - expérience préférée avec les plateformes DCIM - connaissance des pratiques ITIL - préférence

requirements: 3+ years data center operations experience
Expert cabling skills (Cat6/6a, OM3/OM4/OS2 fiber)
Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving abilities
Experience with rack and stack operations
Understanding of power distribution and UPS systems
Excellent documentation and communication skills
Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in demanding environments
Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, CDCE) - preferred
Vendor certifications (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - preferred
Network certifications (CCNA, JNCIA) - preferred
Experience with DCIM platforms - preferred
Knowledge of ITIL practices - preferred

titleByLocale.it: Data Center Technician - Svizzera - Ginevra - On-site
titleByLocale.en: Data Center Technician - Switzerland - Geneva - On-site
titleByLocale.de: Rechenzentrumstechniker - Schweiz - Genf - Vor Ort
titleByLocale.fr: Technicien Data Center - Suisse - Genève - Sur site

jobs.description:
About the Role
 We are seeking an experienced Data Center Technician for freelance/contract work in Geneva, Switzerland . This is an on-site position supporting mission-critical infrastructure at premier data center facilities.
 Compensation
 CHF35-50/hr (CHF hourly)
 Rates vary based on experience level and project complexity. Emergency and after-hours work may qualify for premium rates.
 Engagement Type
 
• Contract/Freelance basis

• Flexible scheduling available

• Project-based or ongoing support

• Remote hands and smart hands services

 Key Responsibilities
 
• Perform hardware installations, decommissions, and migrations

• Execute structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

• Conduct server racking, stacking, and labeling

• Perform cross-connects and patch panel work

• Troubleshoot connectivity and hardware issues

• Document all work with photos and detailed notes

• Coordinate with remote NOC and client teams

Requirements:
• 2+ years data center or IT infrastructure experience

• Strong cabling skills (Cat5e/6/6a, single-mode/multi-mode fiber)

• Experience with server hardware (Dell, HP, Supermicro)

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in raised floor environments

• Own transportation and ability to work on-site

• Professional communication skills in English

• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, or similar) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, CompTIA Network+) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM and ticketing systems - preferred

• Familiarity with major colocation providers - preferred

• Standard tools: screwdrivers, cable testers, label makers, fiber inspection equipment

jobs.description:
About the Role
 We are seeking an experienced Data Center Technician for freelance/contract work in Lupfig, Switzerland . This is an on-site position supporting mission-critical infrastructure at premier data center facilities.
 Compensation
 CHF35-50/hr (CHF hourly)
 Rates vary based on experience level and project complexity. Emergency and after-hours work may qualify for premium rates.
 Engagement Type
 
• Contract/Freelance basis

• Flexible scheduling available

• Project-based or ongoing support

• Remote hands and smart hands services

 Key Responsibilities
 
• Perform hardware installations, decommissions, and migrations

• Execute structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

• Conduct server racking, stacking, and labeling

• Perform cross-connects and patch panel work

• Troubleshoot connectivity and hardware issues

• Document all work with photos and detailed notes

• Coordinate with remote NOC and client teams

Requirements:
• 2+ years data center or IT infrastructure experience

• Strong cabling skills (Cat5e/6/6a, single-mode/multi-mode fiber)

• Experience with server hardware (Dell, HP, Supermicro)

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in raised floor environments

• Own transportation and ability to work on-site

• Professional communication skills in English

• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, or similar) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, CompTIA Network+) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM and ticketing systems - preferred

• Familiarity with major colocation providers - preferred

• Standard tools: screwdrivers, cable testers, label makers, fiber inspection equipment

About the Role
 We are seeking an experienced Data Center Technician for freelance/contract work in Baar, Switzerland . This is an on-site position supporting mission-critical infrastructure at premier data center facilities.
 Compensation
 CHF35-50/hr (CHF hourly)
 Rates vary based on experience level and project complexity. Emergency and after-hours work may qualify for premium rates.

• Contract/Freelance basis

• Flexible scheduling available

• Project-based or ongoing support

• Remote hands and smart hands services

 Key Responsibilities
 
• Perform hardware installations, decommissions, and migrations

• Execute structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

• Conduct server racking, stacking, and labeling

• Perform cross-connects and patch panel work

• Troubleshoot connectivity and hardware issues

• Document all work with photos and detailed notes

• Coordinate with remote NOC and client teams

• 2+ years data center or IT infrastructure experience

• Strong cabling skills (Cat5e/6/6a, single-mode/multi-mode fiber)

• Experience with server hardware (Dell, HP, Supermicro)

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in raised floor environments

• Own transportation and ability to work on-site

• Professional communication skills in English

• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, or similar) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, CompTIA Network+) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM and ticketing systems - preferred

• Familiarity with major colocation providers - preferred

• Standard tools: screwdrivers, cable testers, label makers, fiber inspection equipment

jobs.description:
About the Role
 We are seeking an experienced Data Center Technician for full-time work in St. Gallen, CH . This is an on-site position supporting mission-critical infrastructure at premier data center facilities.
 Engagement Type
 
• Full-time permanent position

• Standard working hours with on-call rotation

• Career growth opportunities

• Benefits package included

 Key Responsibilities
 
• Perform hardware installations, decommissions, and migrations

• Execute structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

• Conduct server racking, stacking, and labeling

• Perform cross-connects and patch panel work

• Troubleshoot connectivity and hardware issues

• Document all work with photos and detailed notes

• Coordinate with remote NOC and client teams

Requirements:
• 2+ years data center or IT infrastructure experience

• Strong cabling skills (Cat5e/6/6a, single-mode/multi-mode fiber)

• Experience with server hardware (Dell, HP, Supermicro)

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in raised floor environments

• Own transportation and ability to work on-site

• Professional communication skills in English

• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, or similar) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, CompTIA Network+) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM and ticketing systems - preferred

• Familiarity with major colocation providers - preferred

• Standard tools: screwdrivers, cable testers, label makers, fiber inspection equipment

About the Role
 We are seeking an experienced Data Center Technician for freelance/contract work in Steinhausen, CH . This is an on-site position supporting mission-critical infrastructure at premier data center facilities.

• Contract/Freelance basis

• Flexible scheduling available

• Project-based or ongoing support

• Remote hands and smart hands services

 Key Responsibilities
 
• Perform hardware installations, decommissions, and migrations

• Execute structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

• Conduct server racking, stacking, and labeling

• Perform cross-connects and patch panel work

• Troubleshoot connectivity and hardware issues

• Document all work with photos and detailed notes

• Coordinate with remote NOC and client teams

• 2+ years data center or IT infrastructure experience

• Strong cabling skills (Cat5e/6/6a, single-mode/multi-mode fiber)

• Experience with server hardware (Dell, HP, Supermicro)

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in raised floor environments

• Own transportation and ability to work on-site

• Professional communication skills in English

• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, or similar) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, CompTIA Network+) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM and ticketing systems - preferred

• Familiarity with major colocation providers - preferred

• Standard tools: screwdrivers, cable testers, label makers, fiber inspection equipment

jobs.description:
About the Role
 We are seeking an experienced Data Center Technician for freelance/contract work in Villars-Ste-Croix, CH . This is an on-site position supporting mission-critical infrastructure at premier data center facilities.
 Engagement Type
 
• Contract/Freelance basis

• Flexible scheduling available

• Project-based or ongoing support

• Remote hands and smart hands services

 Key Responsibilities
 
• Perform hardware installations, decommissions, and migrations

• Execute structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

• Conduct server racking, stacking, and labeling

• Perform cross-connects and patch panel work

• Troubleshoot connectivity and hardware issues

• Document all work with photos and detailed notes

• Coordinate with remote NOC and client teams

Requirements:
• 2+ years data center or IT infrastructure experience

• Strong cabling skills (Cat5e/6/6a, single-mode/multi-mode fiber)

• Experience with server hardware (Dell, HP, Supermicro)

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in raised floor environments

• Own transportation and ability to work on-site

• Professional communication skills in English

• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, or similar) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, CompTIA Network+) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM and ticketing systems - preferred

• Familiarity with major colocation providers - preferred

• Standard tools: screwdrivers, cable testers, label makers, fiber inspection equipment

jobs.description:
About the Role
 We are seeking an experienced Data Center Technician for freelance/contract work in Widnau, CH . This is an on-site position supporting mission-critical infrastructure at premier data center facilities.
 Engagement Type
 
• Contract/Freelance basis

• Flexible scheduling available

• Project-based or ongoing support

• Remote hands and smart hands services

 Key Responsibilities
 
• Perform hardware installations, decommissions, and migrations

• Execute structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

• Conduct server racking, stacking, and labeling

• Perform cross-connects and patch panel work

• Troubleshoot connectivity and hardware issues

• Document all work with photos and detailed notes

• Coordinate with remote NOC and client teams

Requirements:
• 2+ years data center or IT infrastructure experience

• Strong cabling skills (Cat5e/6/6a, single-mode/multi-mode fiber)

• Experience with server hardware (Dell, HP, Supermicro)

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in raised floor environments

• Own transportation and ability to work on-site

• Professional communication skills in English

• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, or similar) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, CompTIA Network+) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM and ticketing systems - preferred

• Familiarity with major colocation providers - preferred

• Standard tools: screwdrivers, cable testers, label makers, fiber inspection equipment

Engagement Type • Contract/Freelance basis • Flexible scheduling available • Project-based or ongoing support • Remote hands and smart hands services Key Responsibilities • Perform hardware installations, decommissions, and migrations • Execute structured cabling (copper and fiber optic) • Conduct server racking, stacking, and labeling • Perform cross-connects and patch panel work • Troubleshoot connectivity and hardware issues • Document all work with photos and detailed notes • Coordinate with remote NOC and client teams Requirements: • 2+ years data center or IT infrastructure experience • Strong cabling skills (Cat5e/6/6a, single-mode/multi-mode fiber) • Experience with server hardware (Dell, HP, Supermicro) • Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in raised floor environments • Own transportation and ability to work on-site • Professional communication skills in English • Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, or similar) - preferred • Network certifications (CCNA, CompTIA Network+) - preferred • Experience with DCIM and ticketing systems - preferred • Familiarity with major colocation providers - preferred • Standard tools: screwdrivers, cable testers, label makers, fiber inspection equipment

descriptionByLocale.fr: À propos du rôle Nous recherchons un technicien expérimenté de Data Center pour le travail freelance/contrat à Winterthur, CH . Il s'agit d'une position sur place qui appuie l'infrastructure essentielle de la mission dans les installations des centres de données de premier plan. Type d'engagement Base de contrat / freelance Programmation flexible disponible Support continu ou basé sur le projet Services à distance et mains intelligentes Principales responsabilités Effectuer des installations matérielles, des déclassements et des migrations Exécuter le câblage structuré (cuivre et fibre optique) Effectuer le racking, l'empilage et l'étiquetage des serveurs Effectuer des connections croisées et des travaux de panneaux de patch Dépannage des problèmes de connectivité et de matériel Documenter tous les travaux avec des photos et des notes détaillées Coordonner avec les équipes clientes et CNO distantes Exigences : 2+ ans d'expérience en data center ou en infrastructure informatique Fortes compétences en câblage (Cat5e/6/6a, fibre monomode/multimode) Expérience avec le matériel serveur (Dell, HP, Supermicro) Capacité de soulever 50 lbs et de travailler dans des environnements surélevés Propre transport et capacité à travailler sur place Compétences professionnelles en communication en anglais Certifications des centres de données (CDCP, CDCS, ou similaire) - certifications réseau préférées (CCNA, CompTIA Network+) - préférence Expérience avec DCIM et systèmes de billetterie - préférence Familiarité avec les principaux fournisseurs de colocation - préférence Outils standard : tournevis, testeurs de câbles, fabricants d'étiquettes, matériel d'inspection de fibres

jobs.description:
About the Role
 We are seeking an experienced Data Center Technician for full-time work in Winterthur, CH . This is an on-site position supporting mission-critical infrastructure at premier data center facilities.
 Engagement Type
 
• Full-time permanent position

• Standard working hours with on-call rotation

• Career growth opportunities

• Benefits package included

 Key Responsibilities
 
• Perform hardware installations, decommissions, and migrations

• Execute structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

• Conduct server racking, stacking, and labeling

• Perform cross-connects and patch panel work

• Troubleshoot connectivity and hardware issues

• Document all work with photos and detailed notes

• Coordinate with remote NOC and client teams

Requirements:
• 2+ years data center or IT infrastructure experience

• Strong cabling skills (Cat5e/6/6a, single-mode/multi-mode fiber)

• Experience with server hardware (Dell, HP, Supermicro)

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in raised floor environments

• Own transportation and ability to work on-site

• Professional communication skills in English

• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, or similar) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, CompTIA Network+) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM and ticketing systems - preferred

• Familiarity with major colocation providers - preferred

• Standard tools: screwdrivers, cable testers, label makers, fiber inspection equipment

jobs.description:
About the Role
 We are seeking an experienced Data Center Technician for freelance/contract work in Zuerich, CH . This is an on-site position supporting mission-critical infrastructure at premier data center facilities.
 Engagement Type
 
• Contract/Freelance basis

• Flexible scheduling available

• Project-based or ongoing support

• Remote hands and smart hands services

 Key Responsibilities
 
• Perform hardware installations, decommissions, and migrations

• Execute structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

• Conduct server racking, stacking, and labeling

• Perform cross-connects and patch panel work

• Troubleshoot connectivity and hardware issues

• Document all work with photos and detailed notes

• Coordinate with remote NOC and client teams

Requirements:
• 2+ years data center or IT infrastructure experience

• Strong cabling skills (Cat5e/6/6a, single-mode/multi-mode fiber)

• Experience with server hardware (Dell, HP, Supermicro)

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in raised floor environments

• Own transportation and ability to work on-site

• Professional communication skills in English

• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, or similar) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, CompTIA Network+) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM and ticketing systems - preferred

• Familiarity with major colocation providers - preferred

• Standard tools: screwdrivers, cable testers, label makers, fiber inspection equipment

jobs.description:
About the Role
 We are seeking an experienced Data Center Technician for full-time work in Zug, CH . This is an on-site position supporting mission-critical infrastructure at premier data center facilities.
 Engagement Type
 
• Full-time permanent position

• Standard working hours with on-call rotation

• Career growth opportunities

• Benefits package included

 Key Responsibilities
 
• Perform hardware installations, decommissions, and migrations

• Execute structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

• Conduct server racking, stacking, and labeling

• Perform cross-connects and patch panel work

• Troubleshoot connectivity and hardware issues

• Document all work with photos and detailed notes

• Coordinate with remote NOC and client teams

Requirements:
• 2+ years data center or IT infrastructure experience

• Strong cabling skills (Cat5e/6/6a, single-mode/multi-mode fiber)

• Experience with server hardware (Dell, HP, Supermicro)

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in raised floor environments

• Own transportation and ability to work on-site

• Professional communication skills in English

• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, or similar) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, CompTIA Network+) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM and ticketing systems - preferred

• Familiarity with major colocation providers - preferred

• Standard tools: screwdrivers, cable testers, label makers, fiber inspection equipment

jobs.description:
About the Role
 Join our team as a Data Center Technician in Biel/Bienne, Switzerland . This is a freelance, on-site position where you'll support critical infrastructure at world-class data center facilities.
 Compensation & Benefits
 CHF80,000-100,000/year (CHF annual)
 Comprehensive benefits package including:
 
• Health, dental, and vision insurance

• Paid time off and holidays

• Professional development allowance

• Certification sponsorship

 Work Schedule
 
• Freelance permanent position

• Standard business hours with on-call rotation

• Shift differentials for nights/weekends when applicable

 Key Responsibilities
 
• Install, configure, and maintain server and network equipment

• Perform structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

• Execute hardware deployments and decommissions

• Monitor environmental systems (power, cooling, security)

• Respond to incidents and perform troubleshooting

• Maintain accurate documentation and asset tracking

• Collaborate with engineering and operations teams

• Participate in capacity planning and upgrades

Requirements:
• 3+ years data center operations experience

• Expert cabling skills (Cat6/6a, OM3/OM4/OS2 fiber)

• Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving abilities

• Experience with rack and stack operations

• Understanding of power distribution and UPS systems

• Excellent documentation and communication skills

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in demanding environments

• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, CDCE) - preferred

• Vendor certifications (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, JNCIA) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM platforms - preferred

• Knowledge of ITIL practices - preferred

jobs.description:
About the Role
 Join our team as a Data Center Technician in Dielsdorf, Switzerland . This is a freelance, on-site position where you'll support critical infrastructure at world-class data center facilities.
 Compensation & Benefits
 CHF80,000-100,000/year (CHF annual)
 Comprehensive benefits package including:
 
• Health, dental, and vision insurance

• Paid time off and holidays

• Professional development allowance

• Certification sponsorship

 Work Schedule
 
• Freelance permanent position

• Standard business hours with on-call rotation

• Shift differentials for nights/weekends when applicable

 Key Responsibilities
 
• Install, configure, and maintain server and network equipment

• Perform structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

• Execute hardware deployments and decommissions

• Monitor environmental systems (power, cooling, security)

• Respond to incidents and perform troubleshooting

• Maintain accurate documentation and asset tracking

• Collaborate with engineering and operations teams

• Participate in capacity planning and upgrades

Requirements:
• 3+ years data center operations experience

• Expert cabling skills (Cat6/6a, OM3/OM4/OS2 fiber)

• Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving abilities

• Experience with rack and stack operations

• Understanding of power distribution and UPS systems

• Excellent documentation and communication skills

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in demanding environments

• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, CDCE) - preferred

• Vendor certifications (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, JNCIA) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM platforms - preferred

• Knowledge of ITIL practices - preferred

jobs.description:
About the Role
 Join our team as a Data Center Technician in Emmen, Switzerland . This is a freelance, on-site position where you'll support critical infrastructure at world-class data center facilities.
 Compensation & Benefits
 CHF80,000-100,000/year (CHF annual)
 Comprehensive benefits package including:
 
• Health, dental, and vision insurance

• Paid time off and holidays

• Professional development allowance

• Certification sponsorship

 Work Schedule
 
• Freelance permanent position

• Standard business hours with on-call rotation

• Shift differentials for nights/weekends when applicable

 Key Responsibilities
 
• Install, configure, and maintain server and network equipment

• Perform structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

• Execute hardware deployments and decommissions

• Monitor environmental systems (power, cooling, security)

• Respond to incidents and perform troubleshooting

• Maintain accurate documentation and asset tracking

• Collaborate with engineering and operations teams

• Participate in capacity planning and upgrades

Requirements:
• 3+ years data center operations experience

• Expert cabling skills (Cat6/6a, OM3/OM4/OS2 fiber)

• Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving abilities

• Experience with rack and stack operations

• Understanding of power distribution and UPS systems

• Excellent documentation and communication skills

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in demanding environments

• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, CDCE) - preferred

• Vendor certifications (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, JNCIA) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM platforms - preferred

• Knowledge of ITIL practices - preferred

descriptionByLocale.en: About the Role Join our team as a Data Center Technician in Gais, Switzerland . This is a freelance, on-site position where you'll support critical infrastructure at world-class data center facilities. Compensation & Benefits CHF80,000-100,000/year (CHF annual) Comprehensive benefits package including: • Health, dental, and vision insurance • Paid time off and holidays • Professional development allowance • Certification sponsorship Work Schedule • Freelance permanent position • Standard business hours with on-call rotation • Shift differentials for nights/weekends when applicable Key Responsibilities • Install, configure, and maintain server and network equipment • Perform structured cabling (copper and fiber optic) • Execute hardware deployments and decommissions • Monitor environmental systems (power, cooling, security) • Respond to incidents and perform troubleshooting • Maintain accurate documentation and asset tracking • Collaborate with engineering and operations teams • Participate in capacity planning and upgrades Requirements: • 3+ years data center operations experience • Expert cabling skills (Cat6/6a, OM3/OM4/OS2 fiber) • Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving abilities • Experience with rack and stack operations • Understanding of power distribution and UPS systems • Excellent documentation and communication skills • Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in demanding environments • Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, CDCE) - preferred • Vendor certifications (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - preferred • Network certifications (CCNA, JNCIA) - preferred • Experience with DCIM platforms - preferred • Knowledge of ITIL practices - preferred

Entlohnung und Vorteile CHF80,000-100,000/Jahr (CHF jährlich) Kumulativer Vorteils-Paket, einschließlich: Gesundheits-, Zahn- und Augenversicherung Bezahltes Urlaub und Feiertage Entwicklungszuschuss Zertifizierungssponsorship Arbeitszeit Freiberufliche dauerhafte Position Standardarbeitszeit mit Notfallrotation Schichtdifferenz für Abend- und Wochenendarbeit, wenn anwendbar Hauptverantwortlichkeiten Installieren, konfigurieren und warten Sie Server- und Netzwerkgeräte Durchführen von strukturierten Kabeln (Kupfer und Glasfaser) Durchführen von Hardware-Deployments und -Decommissionings Überwachen Sie Umweltsysteme (Leistung, Kühlung, Sicherheit) Antworten auf Vorfälle und führen Sie Debugging durch Halten Sie genaue Dokumentation und Asset-Tracking Arbeiten Sie mit den Teams für Engineering und Operations zusammen Teilnehmen Sie an der Kapazitätsplanung und -upgrades Requisiten: 3+ Jahre Erfahrung in Data Center-Betriebsoperationen Experte-Kabel-Fähigkeiten (Cat6/6a, OM3/OM4/OS2 Glasfaser) Starke Fähigkeiten zum Debuggen und Problemlösung Erfahrung mit Rack- und Stack-Operationen Verständnis von Leistungsdistribution und UPS-Systemen Ausgezeichnete Dokumentations- und Kommunikationsfähigkeiten Fähigkeit, 50+ lbs zu heben und in anspruchsvollen Umgebungen zu arbeiten Data Center-Zertifizierungen (CDCP, CDCS, CDCE) - bevorzugt Lieferanten-Zertifizierungen (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - bevorzugt Netzwerkkompetenzen (CCNA, JNCIA) - bevorzugt Erfahrung mit DCIM-Plattformen - bevorzugt Kenntnisse von ITIL-Praktiken - bevorzugt

jobs.description:
About the Role
 Join our team as a Data Center Technician in Geneva, Switzerland . This is a full-time, on-site position where you'll support critical infrastructure at world-class data center facilities.
 Compensation & Benefits
 CHF80,000-100,000/year (CHF annual)
 Comprehensive benefits package including:
 
• Health, dental, and vision insurance

• Paid time off and holidays

• Professional development allowance

• Certification sponsorship

 Work Schedule
 
• Full-time permanent position

• Standard business hours with on-call rotation

• Shift differentials for nights/weekends when applicable

 Key Responsibilities
 
• Install, configure, and maintain server and network equipment

• Perform structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

• Execute hardware deployments and decommissions

• Monitor environmental systems (power, cooling, security)

• Respond to incidents and perform troubleshooting

• Maintain accurate documentation and asset tracking

• Collaborate with engineering and operations teams

• Participate in capacity planning and upgrades

Requirements:
• 3+ years data center operations experience

• Expert cabling skills (Cat6/6a, OM3/OM4/OS2 fiber)

• Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving abilities

• Experience with rack and stack operations

• Understanding of power distribution and UPS systems

• Excellent documentation and communication skills

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in demanding environments

• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, CDCE) - preferred

• Vendor certifications (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, JNCIA) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM platforms - preferred

• Knowledge of ITIL practices - preferred

jobs.description:
Reboot Monkey is a global leader in IT solutions, specializing in data center management that simplifies your IT operations. We provide hosting space, future-proof upgrades, and 24/7 support through our smart or remote hands, ensuring seamless, secure, and sustainable service. Our fully remote, round-the-clock management frees businesses from supervision hassles, setting new benchmarks in data center solutions. We’re seeking skilled Freelance Data Center Technicians to join our growing team. If you have expertise in data center operations and want flexible work, we’d love to hear from you.

 

 Job Overview: 
 As a Freelance Data Center Technician, you will play a key role in delivering on-demand support to our global data centers. Your responsibilities will include hardware installation, troubleshooting complex issues, and managing network operations, ensuring optimal performance and reliability. We’re looking for someone with deep expertise in data center equipment and software who can work independently while collaborating with remote teams. In this role, you’ll be essential to maintaining smooth, secure, and efficient data center operations, contributing to our high standards of service excellence.
 

 Key Responsibilities: 
 
• Install, configure, and maintain servers, networking equipment, and other hardware to ensure optimal performance and maximum uptime, facilitating seamless operations within the data center.

• Monitor data center operations both remotely and on-site, quickly diagnosing and resolving hardware, software, and connectivity issues to minimize downtime and maintain service reliability.

• Configure, manage, and troubleshoot networking devices, including Cisco and Juniper routers, switches, and firewalls, to ensure secure and efficient network operations that align with organizational standards.

• Manage and troubleshoot both Linux and Windows-based systems, performing essential updates, patches, and security enhancements to keep systems secure and up-to-date.

• Document all installations, repairs, maintenance tasks, and system performance , providing comprehensive reports to the remote management team to ensure transparency and accountability in operations.

• Implement and maintain security protocols to protect the integrity of the data center infrastructure, ensuring compliance with industry standards and best practices for data security.

• Collaborate with remote IT teams, vendors, and stakeholders to enhance data center operations, actively participating in the planning and execution of projects that drive efficiency and innovation.

 

 What We Offer: 
 
• Flexibility: Work around your existing freelance or permanent job. You choose the tickets you want to pick up, with no minimum hour commitment.

• Professional Environment: Join a professional work environment where you can reconnect with the practical side of IT.

• Competitive Compensation: We offer competitive rewards for your compensation and efforts.

• Growth Opportunities: Work with compelling clients and seize opportunities to grow in your field.

Requirements:
• Education: 
 
• Associate or Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field is preferred but not required.

 

• Experience: 
 
• 3+ years of experience in data center operations, with a strong focus on independent or freelance projects.

 

• Technical Skills: 
 
• Extensive hands-on experience with Cisco and Juniper networking devices.

• Strong proficiency in managing and troubleshooting Windows and Linux-based systems.

• Solid understanding of networking principles (TCP/IP, DNS, VPN, VLANs).

• Experience with virtualization technologies such as VMware or Hyper-V is a plus.

 

• Certifications: 
 
• Valid certifications like Cisco CCNA/CCNP, Juniper JNCIA/JNCIS, or CompTIA Linux+ are highly desirable.

 

• General Requirements: 
 
• Ability to travel to various data center locations on short notice.

• Flexibility to work outside regular hours, including nights and weekends if required.

• Must have access to necessary tools and equipment to perform data center tasks.

• Strong problem-solving skills, with the ability to work independently and remotely.

• Excellent communication skills for collaboration with remote teams.

descriptionByLocale.it: Reboot Monkey è un leader globale nelle soluzioni IT, specializzato nella gestione dei data center che semplifica le tue operazioni IT. Offriamo spazio di hosting, aggiornamenti futuri e supporto 24/7 attraverso le nostre mani intelligenti o a distanza, garantendo un servizio senza intoppi, sicuro e sostenibile. La nostra gestione completamente remota, a orario continuo, libera le aziende dalle preoccupazioni di supervisione, stabilendo nuovi standard nelle soluzioni dei data center. Stiamo cercando tecnici freelance esperti in data center operazioni per unirci al nostro team in crescita. Se hai competenze in data center operazioni e vuoi lavorare in modo flessibile, ci piacerebbe sentire da te. Riassunto del lavoro: Come tecnico freelance di data center, avrai un ruolo chiave nel fornire supporto su richiesta ai nostri data center globali. Le tue responsabilità includeranno l'installazione di hardware, la risoluzione di problemi complessi e la gestione delle operazioni di rete, garantendo prestazioni ottimali e affidabilità. Cerchiamo qualcuno con competenze approfondite in dispositivi di data center e software che possa lavorare indipendentemente, ma collaborare con team remoti. In questo ruolo, sarai essenziale per mantenere operazioni di data center liscie, sicure ed efficienti, contribuendo ai nostri alti standard di eccellenza del servizio. Responsabilità principali: Installare, configurare e mantenere server, dispositivi di rete e altro hardware per garantire prestazioni ottimali e massimo uptime, facilitando operazioni liscie all'interno del data center. Monitorare le operazioni del data center sia a distanza che sul posto, diagnosticando e risolvendo rapidamente problemi di hardware, software e connettività per minimizzare il downtime e garantire la sicurezza del servizio. Configurare, gestire e risolvere problemi con dispositivi di rete, compresi router, switch e firewall Cisco e Juniper, per garantire operazioni di rete sicure ed efficienti che si allineano alle norme organizzative. Gestire e risolvere problemi con sistemi basati su Linux e Windows, eseguendo aggiornamenti essenziali, patch e miglioramenti di sicurezza per mantenere i sistemi sicuri e aggiornati. Documentare tutte le installazioni, le riparazioni, le attività di manutenzione e le prestazioni dei sistemi, fornendo rapporti dettagliati al team di gestione remoto per garantire trasparenza e responsabilità nelle operazioni. Implementare e mantenere protocolli di sicurezza per proteggere l'integrità dell'infrastruttura del data center, garantendo la conformità con gli standard industriali e le migliori pratiche per la sicurezza dei dati. Collaborare con team IT remoti, fornitori e stakeholder per migliorare le operazioni del data center, partecipando attivamente alla pianificazione e all'esecuzione di progetti che promuovono l'efficienza e l'innovazione. Cosa offriamo: Flessibilità: Lavora intorno al tuo lavoro freelance o permanente. Seleziona i ticket che vuoi affrontare, senza impegno orario minimo. Ambiente professionale: Unisciti a un ambiente di lavoro professionale dove puoi riconnetterti con il lato pratico dell'IT. Compensazione competitiva: Offriamo ricompense competitive per la tua compensazione e sforzo. Opportunità di crescita: Lavora con clienti affascinanti e cogli l'opportunità di crescere nel tuo campo. Requisiti: Istruzione: Laurea o laurea magistrale in Informatica, Ingegneria dell'Informazione o campo correlato è preferita ma non obbligatoria. Esperienza: 3+ anni di esperienza in operazioni di data center, con un forte focus su progetti indipendenti o freelance. Abilità tecniche: Estesa esperienza pratica con dispositivi di rete Cisco e Juniper. Profonda competenza nella gestione e risoluzione di problemi con sistemi basati su Windows e Linux. Comprensione solida dei principi di rete (TCP/IP, DNS, VPN, VLAN). Certificazioni: Certificazioni valide come Cisco CCNA/CCNP, Juniper JNCIA/JNCIS o CompTIA Linux+ sono altamente desiderabili. Requisiti generali: Capacità di viaggiare a varie ubicazioni dei data center con breve preavviso. Flessibilità per lavorare fuori dalle ore regolari, compresi la notte e i fine settimana se richiesto. Dovresti avere accesso alle attrezzature e agli strumenti necessari per eseguire le attività dei data center. Abilità di risoluzione dei problemi forti, con la capacità di lavorare indipendentemente e a distanza. Abilità di comunicazione eccellente per la collaborazione con team remoti.

descriptionByLocale.de: Reboot Monkey ist ein globaler Führer in IT-Lösungen, der sich auf die Datenzentrumverwaltung spezialisiert, die deine IT-Operationen vereinfacht. Wir bieten Hosting-Raum, zukunftsweisende Upgrades und 24/7-Unterstützung durch unsere intelligente oder ferngesteuerte Hände, um einen reibungslosen, sicheren und nachhaltigen Service zu gewährleisten. Unsere vollständig remote, rund-um-die-Uhr-Verwaltung befreit Unternehmen von Überwachungsproblemen, setzt neue Standards in Datenzentrum-Lösungen. Wir suchen qualifizierte Freelance-Data-Center-Techniker, um unser wachsendes Team zu verstärken. Wenn du Erfahrung in Datenzentrum-Operationen hast und flexible Arbeit suchst, würden wir gerne von dir hören. Jobübersicht: Als Freelance-Data-Center-Techniker wirst du eine Schlüsselfunktion bei der Bereitstellung von Bedarfssupport für unsere globalen Datenzentren haben. Deine Aufgaben werden Hardware-Installationen, die Behebung komplexer Probleme und die Verwaltung von Netzwerkoperationen umfassen, um eine optimale Leistung und Zuverlässigkeit sicherzustellen. Wir suchen jemanden mit tiefen Kenntnissen in Datenzentrum-Ausrüstung und -Software, der unabhängig arbeiten kann, aber mit Remote-Teams zusammenarbeiten kann. In dieser Rolle wirst du entscheidend für die Gewährleistung glatter, sicherer und effizienter Datenzentrum-Operationen sein, die zu unseren hohen Standards von Serviceleistungen beitragen. Hauptaufgaben: Hardware-Installationen, -Konfigurationen und -Wartung durchführen, um eine optimale Leistung und einen maximalen Betriebszustand sicherzustellen, um reibungslose Operationen innerhalb des Datenzentrums zu ermöglichen. Datenzentrum-Operationen sowohl fern als auch auf der Grundlage überwachen, um Hardware-, Software- und Netzwerkprobleme schnell zu diagnostizieren und zu beheben, um den Betriebsausfall zu minimieren und die Servicezuverlässigkeit zu gewährleisten. Netzwerkgeräte, einschließlich Cisco- und Juniper-Router, -Switches und -Firewalls, konfigurieren, verwalten und Probleme beheben, um sichere und effiziente Netzwerkoperationen sicherzustellen, die sich an organisatorische Standards anpassen. Sowohl Linux- als auch Windows-basierte Systeme verwalten und Probleme beheben, notwendige Updates, Patches und Sicherheitsverbesserungen durchführen, um die Systeme sicher und aktuell zu halten. Alle Installationen, Reparaturen, Wartungsarbeiten und Systemleistungen dokumentieren, um detaillierte Berichte für das remote Management-Team zu liefern, um Transparenz und Verantwortlichkeit in den Operationen sicherzustellen. Sicherheitsprotokolle implementieren und aufrechterhalten, um die Integrität der Datenzentrum-Infrastruktur zu schützen, um die Einhaltung von Branchenstandards und besten Praktiken für die Datensicherheit sicherzustellen. Mit Remote-IT-Teams, Lieferanten und Stakeholdern zusammenarbeiten, um die Datenzentrum-Operationen zu verbessern, aktiv am Planen und Durchführen von Projekten teilnehmen, die Effizienz und Innovation fördern. Was wir bieten: Flexibilität: Lass dich um deine bestehende Freelance- oder Festanstellung herum arbeiten. Wähle die Tickets, die du aufnehmen möchtest, ohne Mindeststundenzahlung. Professionelles Umfeld: Steig in ein professionelles Arbeitsumfeld ein, in dem du dich mit dem praktischen Aspekt der IT wieder verbindest. Wettbewerbsfähige Vergütung: Wir bieten wettbewerbsfähige Belohnungen für deine Vergütung und Bemühungen. Wachstumsmöglichkeiten: Arbeite mit faszinierenden Kunden und nutze die Gelegenheit, in deinem Bereich zu wachsen. Anforderungen: Ausbildung: Ein Studium der Informatik, der Informatik oder eines verwandten Fachgebiets ist wünschenswert, aber nicht erforderlich. Erfahrung: 3+ Jahre Erfahrung in Datenzentrum-Operationen, mit einem starken Fokus auf unabhängige oder Freelance-Projekte. Technische Fähigkeiten: Umfangreiche Praxiserfahrung mit Cisco- und Juniper-Netzwerkgeräten. Profunde Kenntnisse in der Verwaltung und Behebung von Problemen mit Windows- und Linux-basierten Systemen. Solide Verständnis der Netzwerkprinzipien (TCP/IP, DNS, VPN, VLAN). Zertifizierungen: Gültige Zertifizierungen wie Cisco CCNA/CCNP, Juniper JNCIA/JNCIS oder CompTIA Linux+ sind sehr wünschenswert. Allgemeine Anforderungen: Fähigkeit, zu verschiedenen Datenzentrum-Orten auf kurze Anfragen zu reisen. Flexibilität, um außerhalb der regulären Arbeitszeit, einschließlich Abend- und Wochenendarbeit, zu arbeiten, wenn erforderlich. Muss Zugang zu notwendigen Werkzeugen und Geräten haben, um Datenzentrum-Aufgaben durchzuführen. Starke Problemlösungsfähigkeiten, mit der Fähigkeit, unabhängig und fern zu arbeiten. Hervorragende Kommunikationsfähigkeiten für die Zusammenarbeit mit Remote-Teams.
descriptionByLocale.fr: Reboot Monkey est un leader mondial dans les solutions IT, spécialisé dans la gestion des centres de données qui simplifie vos opérations IT. Nous offrons un espace d'hébergement, des mises à jour futures et un soutien 24/7 grâce à nos mains intelligentes ou à distance, garantissant un service sans heurts, sûr et durable. Notre gestion complètement à distance, 24h/24, libère les entreprises des soucis de supervision, établissant de nouveaux standards dans les solutions de centres de données. Nous recherchons des techniciens freelance expérimentés en opérations de centres de données pour rejoindre notre équipe en croissance. Si vous avez des compétences en opérations de centres de données et que vous souhaitez travailler de manière flexible, nous aimerions vous entendre. Aperçu du poste: En tant que technicien freelance de centre de données, vous jouerez un rôle clé dans la fourniture de soutien sur demande à nos centres de données mondiaux. Vos responsabilités incluront l'installation de matériel, la résolution de problèmes complexes et la gestion des opérations de réseau, pour garantir des performances optimales et de la fiabilité. Nous recherchons quelqu'un avec des compétences approfondies en équipement et logiciels de centre de données qui peut travailler de manière indépendante, mais collaborer avec des équipes à distance. Dans ce rôle, vous serez essentiel pour maintenir des opérations de centre de données lisses, sûres et efficaces, contribuant à nos hauts standards de service. Responsabilités principales: Installer, configurer et maintenir des serveurs, des équipements de réseau et d'autres matériel pour garantir des performances optimales et un maximum d'uptime, facilitant des opérations lisses au sein du centre de données. Surveiller les opérations du centre de données, à la fois à distance et sur place, pour diagnostiquer et résoudre rapidement les problèmes de matériel, de logiciel et de connectivité pour minimiser les temps d'arrêt et maintenir la fiabilité du service. Configurer, gérer et résoudre les problèmes des équipements de réseau, y compris les routeurs, les commutateurs et les pare-feu Cisco et Juniper, pour garantir des opérations de réseau sûres et efficaces qui se conforment aux normes organisationnelles. Gérer et résoudre les problèmes des systèmes basés sur Linux et Windows, exécuter les mises à jour essentielles, les correctifs et les améliorations de sécurité pour maintenir les systèmes sûrs et à jour. Documenter toutes les installations, les réparations, les tâches de maintenance et les performances des systèmes, pour fournir des rapports détaillés au équipe de gestion à distance pour garantir la transparence et la responsabilité dans les opérations. Mettre en œuvre et maintenir des protocoles de sécurité pour protéger l'intégrité de l'infrastructure du centre de données, pour garantir la conformité aux normes industrielles et aux meilleures pratiques de sécurité des données. Collaborer avec les équipes IT à distance, les fournisseurs et les parties prenantes pour améliorer les opérations du centre de données, participer activement à la planification et à l'exécution de projets qui favorisent l'efficacité et l'innovation. Ce que nous offrons: Flexibilité: Travaillez autour de votre emploi freelance ou permanent existant. Sélectionnez les tickets que vous souhaitez prendre en charge, sans engagement horaire minimum. Environnement professionnel: Rejoignez un environnement de travail professionnel où vous pouvez vous reconnecter au côté pratique de l'IT. Compensation compétitive: Nous offrons des récompenses compétitives pour votre compensation et vos efforts. Opportunités de croissance: Travaillez avec des clients passionnants et profitez des opportunités de croissance dans votre domaine. Requis: Formation: Un diplôme en informatique, en informatique ou un domaine connexe est souhaitable mais non obligatoire. Expérience: 3+ ans d'expérience en opérations de centres de données, avec un fort focus sur des projets indépendants ou freelance. Compétences techniques: Expérience pratique étendue avec les équipements de réseau Cisco et Juniper. Compétences approfondies dans la gestion et la résolution de problèmes avec les systèmes basés sur Windows et Linux. Compréhension solide des principes de réseau (TCP/IP, DNS, VPN, VLAN). Certifications: Certifications valables comme Cisco CCNA/CCNP, Juniper JNCIA/JNCIS ou CompTIA Linux+ sont hautement souhaitables. Requis généraux: Capacité de voyager à différentes emplacements des centres de données sur des demandes courtes. Flexibilité pour travailler en dehors des heures régulières, y compris la nuit et les week-ends si nécessaire. Devoir avoir accès aux outils et aux équipements nécessaires pour effectuer les tâches des centres de données. Compétences de résolution de problèmes fortes, avec la capacité de travailler de manière indépendante et à distance. Compétences de communication exceptionnelles pour la collaboration avec des équipes à distance.

jobs.title: Data Center Technician - Switzerland - Bern - On-site

titleByLocale.it: Data Center Technician - Svizzera - Berna - On-site
titleByLocale.en: Data Center Technician - Switzerland - Bern - On-site
titleByLocale.de: Data Center Techniker - Switzerland - Bern - On-site
titleByLocale.fr: Technicien en centre de données - Suisse - Berne - Sur place

jobs.description:
About the Role
 We are seeking an experienced Data Center Technician for freelance/contract work in Bern, Switzerland . This is an on-site position supporting mission-critical infrastructure at premier data center facilities.
 Compensation
 CHF35-50/hr (CHF hourly)
 Rates vary based on experience level and project complexity. Emergency and after-hours work may qualify for premium rates.
 Engagement Type
 
• Contract/Freelance basis

• Flexible scheduling available

• Project-based or ongoing support

• Remote hands and smart hands services

 Key Responsibilities
 
• Perform hardware installations, decommissions, and migrations

• Execute structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

• Conduct server racking, stacking, and labeling

• Perform cross-connects and patch panel work

• Troubleshoot connectivity and hardware issues

• Document all work with photos and detailed notes

• Coordinate with remote NOC and client teams

Requirements:
• 2+ years data center or IT infrastructure experience

• Strong cabling skills (Cat5e/6/6a, single-mode/multi-mode fiber)

• Experience with server hardware (Dell, HP, Supermicro)

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in raised floor environments

• Own transportation and ability to work on-site

• Professional communication skills in English

• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, or similar) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, CompTIA Network+) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM and ticketing systems - preferred

• Familiarity with major colocation providers - preferred

• Standard tools: screwdrivers, cable testers, label makers, fiber inspection equipment
